title: Love Gaming? Come Dominate With Us
description:
Running operations here is a lot like dominating in Mobile Legends or Dota 2. You’ll need fast decision-making, clear team communication, and the ability to adapt when things don’t go as planned. If you love teamwork and keeping things in order, this role could be a great fit for you.



Title: Operations Analyst



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Hours: Full-time (45+ hours per week), long-term

Days: 5 days a week, 8am to 6pm or similar, exact days of week TBD

Time-zone: U.S. Central Time (CST)

Pay: $1100 USD / month



Role:

- Ensure our stores have the right amount of inventory in stock by placing the right orders

- Communicate effectively with on-the-ground teams by both phone and text to coordinate activities and facilitate operations

- Troubleshoot problems as they arise in operational processes

- Ensure accurate tracking of team hours and activities

- Hold tea
mbers accountable for their responsibilities and performance

- Contribute to the overall mission of improving the company and enhancing operational smoothness



Requirements:

- A smile on your face daily - let’s have some fun!

- Extremely high attention to detail and organizational skills

- Strong mathematical capabilities

- Strong written and oral English skills

- A self-starter who can work independently

- Bachelor Degree or higher (summa, magna or cum laude and/or Academic Scholar from a reputable college is a plus!)

- Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

- Designated office space in your home



Why Join Us:

- Steady, Long-Term Work: Enjoy the stability of a company that values long-term relationships with its employees

- Great People: We hire people who are positive, smart, and get things done. Being around great people makes us all better every day

- Dynamic Work: Every day is a little bit different here. Be challenged and solve new problems regularly.

- Remote Work: 100% remote.



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do both of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

title: TikTok / Instagram Reel Scriptwriter (Sneaker Culture)
description:
We are looking for a creative scriptwriter to help plan and write short-form content for a fast-growing sneaker brand.

Our brand helps sneaker collectors protect and preserve their shoes between wears.

Your job will be to write viral hooks and short scripts for Instagram Reels and TikTok.

If you love sneakers, streetwear, or sneaker culture — this is a great role.



Responsibilities

You will help create content ideas and scripts for videos such as:

• Sneaker preservation tips

• Viral sneaker facts

• “Did you know?” sneaker content

• Sneaker restoration videos

• Collector tips and secrets

• Funny sneaker culture content



Weekly Deliverables

Every week you will provide:

• 10–15 viral hooks

• 10 short Reel / TikTok scripts

• Trend research for sneaker content



Requirements

• Experience writing TikTok / Instagram Reel scripts

• Strong understanding of viral hooks

• Good written English

• Ability to write short, engaging scripts



Bonus if you:

• Like sneakers or streetwear

• Understand sneaker culture

title: Legal Virtual Assistant (ChatGPT | Intake | Lead Tracking)
description:
About Us

Wobbe Tenant Law, PC is a growing tenant-side housing law firm based in San Francisco, CA. We fight for renters' rights and take our clients' situations seriously. We run a lean, professional operation and we're looking for a sharp, self-directed Virtual Assistant to become a key part of how we manage new client leads, track opportunities, and grow our reputation.

This is not a data-entry role. We need someone who thinks, uses good judgment, and takes ownership of their work without being micromanaged.



What You'll Do

1. Intake Analysis



Review incoming potential client inquiries for a tenant-side housing law firm

Run each intake through our ChatGPT-based intake analyzer using prompts we provide

Apply judgment to sort qualified leads from unqualified ones based on our criteria

Flag edge cases and communicate them clearly to the attorney



2. Lead Tracking & Pipeline Management



Maintain and update our lead tracking system in Airtable and our legal CRM Lawcus

Send the attorney timely reminders and status updates on leads being nurtured

Keep the pipeline organized so nothing falls through the cracks



3. Google Review Outreach



Follow up with clients after their matter closes

Send professional messages responding to Google reviews

Track who has been asked to leave a review and who has not



You Are a Great Fit If You:



Have strong written English — clear, professional, no grammatical errors

Are already comfortable using ChatGPT daily and understand how prompts work

Have experience supporting a law firm, legal professional, or professional services business

Are familiar with Airtable (strongly preferred)

Have experience with Lawcus or any legal CRM such as Clio or MyCase (a bonus, not required)

Are proactive — you send updates before being asked

Are honest and accurate with your time (we use LeanLaw for time tracking)

Can work independently and flag problems early rather than going quiet

Have reliable internet and a quiet, professional workspace

Are available weekdays between 3-5 pm PST. 



This Is NOT the Right Role If You:



Need constant supervision or step-by-step direction to complete tasks

Are juggling 5+ other clients and cannot prioritize this role

Are not already using AI tools in your daily work

Have trouble maintaining consistent availability during agreed hours



To Apply

We read every application carefully. To be considered, you must do all of the following:



Write a 3–5 sentence cover note explaining specifically why you are a strong fit for this role — not a generic introduction

List the AI tools you use regularly and describe one specific example of how you used ChatGPT to solve a problem or improve a workflow

Tell us whether you have experience with Airtable, Lawcus, or any other legal CRM

Include your resume 

Write the word "WTL" at the top of your application so we know you read this fully



Applications that do not follow these instructions will not be reviewed.



What We Offer



Consistent, long-term part-time work with a stable, mission-driven law firm

Opportunity to grow hours and responsibility as trust is established

A respectful, direct working relationship — clear expectations, honest feedback, no micromanagement

Weekly pay

title: Digital Sales & Marketing Specialist
description:
Full time career opportunity – diverse B2B/B2C Digital Sales & Marketing role in consumer products – growing responsibilities

A great long term career opportunity awaits a driven, agile, digital-savvy, hungry-to-learn individual who wants to take on growing responsibilities in using AI to drive digital sales and marketing for two exciting Australian consumer brands.

I own two established consumer brands (both have been around for over 50 years), historically operating in the wholesale space (800+ stockists). Over the last couple of years, the B2C channel has grown in importance and its simply too much workload for me to manage. 

Your workload would consist of 2-3 hours per day of digital development work (enhancing websites functionalities and SEO improvements) another 1-2 hour on digital marketing initiatives (from EDMs to SEM) and the remainder on managing marketplace offerings and promotions.  You will implement digital support projects (eg editing product images in Canva, generating AI images for digital ads, managing & optimising google ads, updating online marketplace listings on eBay, Iconic, Faire, Fieldfolio, Fruugo, Amazon) as well as responding to social media posts and posting pro-actively on social media (less than 2 hours per week). You are expected to explore how to use AI tools to make this work more efficient. 

You already have experience in Digital Sales Support, consider yourself a fast learner and self-starter who is willing to take on additional responsibilities to support all sales activity through all our digital sales channels. You have a can-do attitude and are comfortable handling multiple tasks simultaneously.

Advanced Microsoft office experience is required, including having previously managed websites and online marketplaces such as eBay and Amazon. You have significant experience using Shopify and Ahrefs and have a good working knowledge with Canva and AI image generation. You have capability to manage SEO and Google Ads, are an expert in building backlinks, improving keywords and have some experience with AI tools such as Claude Cowork, Gemini and are keen to trial new tools in this space. You have experience managing marketplace sales such as Amazon and are driven by improving sales. Some website development experience would also be beneficial. Any challenges you face that are not defined by our procedures, you are willing to research yourself (eg youtube videos) to figure out how to do something. 

The role is fulltime with salary increases over time in line with increased responsibilities. Hours are Monday to Friday and we honor most Filipino holidays except for All Saints and All Souls Day. Once you complete your 6 months’ probation, you are eligible for a 13th month salary.

This is a fantastic full-time career opportunity and the owner of the business is willing to invest a lot of time into your development. As such, if you are only after a short-term contract or prefer to continue doing some gig-work on the side, this role is not for you.

We are looking for a visually skilled Squarespace Web Designer to support a growing design studio that works primarily with natural and allied health practitioners.

title: Chief Financial Officer (CFO)

title: CRO / Website Specialist (GoHighLevel + WordPress)
description:
We’re a growing U.S.-based marketing agency that helps service-based businesses grow through paid ads, landing pages, websites, funnels, and systems.



We’re looking for a CRO / Website Specialist who is very strong in GoHighLevel and WordPress.



Your main role will be building, editing, improving, and QA-ing websites and landing pages with a strong focus on conversion.



This is not mainly a graphic design role.

This is not mainly a Google Ads management role.



We want someone who is strongest at:

 • building pages in GHL

 • editing and improving sites in WordPress

 • making pages look clean and professional

 • improving mobile responsiveness

 • thinking through layout, flow, CTA placement, and conversion



You do not need to be an advanced Google Ads strategist, but it is a strong bonus if you understand the basics of Google Ads and how landing pages support paid traffic.



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to grow with a fast-moving agency and play an important role in helping client campaigns perform better.



(Directions on how to apply are at the bottom of this posting.)



JOB REQUIREMENTS

 • Strong hands-on experience with GoHighLevel

 • Strong hands-on experience with WordPress

 • Experience building and editing websites, landing pages, and funnels

 • Strong eye for layout, spacing, section structure, and mobile optimization

 • Able to build clean, high-converting pages from examples, briefs, or direction

 • Experience with forms, buttons, embeds, calendars, and basic integrations

 • Strong attention to detail and ability to QA your own work

 • Fast and accurate with revisions

 • Comfortable working across multiple client projects

 • Fluent written and spoken English

 • Good communicator

 • Reliable internet and dependable work habits

 • Available full time Monday–Friday



BONUS SKILLS (Nice to Have)

 • Basic to intermediate Google Ads experience

 • Understanding of how landing pages connect to paid traffic

 • Familiarity with conversion tracking

 • Experience with GA4, GTM, pixels, or event setup

 • Understanding of CRO / conversion principles

 • Experience with service business lead generation

 • Ability to spot weak headlines, poor CTA placement, cluttered layouts, or friction points on a page



WHAT YOU’LL BE DOING

 • Building and editing websites in GoHighLevel and WordPress

 • Creating landing pages for paid traffic campaigns

 • Improving existing pages for better conversion

 • Making sites mobile responsive and clean across devices

 • Setting up forms, calendars, buttons, and page sections

 • Supporting website launches and page updates

 • QA-ing pages before they go live

 • Making ongoing edits and improvements for clients

 • Supporting ad-to-page funnel execution

 • Occasionally assisting with Google Ads-related tasks if you have experience there



IMPORTANT



This role is best for someone who is:

 • very strong in GHL

 • very solid in WordPress

 • interested in conversion-focused page building

 • at least somewhat familiar with Google Ads



We are looking for someone who can help us execute quickly, improve page quality, and support better campaign performance.



HOW TO APPLY

 1.
 us at 

 2. Use this subject line: CRO / Website Specialist – GHL + WordPress

 3. Attach your resume

 4. Include your OnlineJobs.ph profile link

 5. Include links to 3–5 pages or websites you have built or edited in GoHighLevel or WordPress

 6. Include a screenshot of your internet speed. 

 7.  In your
, answer these questions:

- How many years of experience do you have with GoHighLevel?

- How many years of experience do you have with WordPress?

- Which platform are you stronger in: GHL or WordPress?

- Have you built landing pages for paid ads before?

- What do you usually look for when trying to improve a landing page’s conversion rate?

- How much Google Ads experience do you have? (Beginner / Intermediate / Advanced)

 8. Send us a short message here on OnlineJobs.ph letting us know you applied by



We’ll review applications and reply by
 with next steps for qualified candidates.



Thank you and we look forward to hearing from you.

title: Real Estate Transaction Coordinator
description:
Real Estate Transaction Coordinator (Land Investing)



We are looking for a highly organized Transaction Coordinator to help manage and move real estate deals from contract to closing. Are you able to think outside the box? 



Our company specializes in buying and selling land across the United States, and this role is critical to keeping deals organized, on schedule, and moving forward.



You will work directly with the founder and team to coordinate transactions, communicate with contractors and title companies, and manage project timelines.



This is a remote role with long-term growth potential for the right person.



Responsibilities

Transaction Coordination



Manage land transactions from contract to closing



Communicate with title companies and real estate agents



Track deadlines and ensure documents are completed on time



Monitor deal progress and follow up on outstanding items



Project Coordination



Call contractors for quotes, updates, and scheduling



Help coordinate property improvements (clearing, surveys, signage, etc.)



Track project timelines and ensure work is completed



Property Marketing Support



Upload and update listing photos



Light editing of photos when needed



Assist with preparing listings for sale



Deal Support



Assist with overseeing property purchases



Organize documents and maintain deal records



Keep internal spreadsheets and systems updated



Qualifications



Highly organized and detail-oriented



Strong communication skills (phone,
, and text)



Comfortable managing multiple deals and deadlines



Able to follow up and keep projects moving forward



Self-motivated and reliable



Required Communication Skills



This role requires frequent phone communication with U.S.-based businesses, including:



Title companies



Real estate agents



Contractors and service providers



Applicants must be comfortable speaking on the phone in English with U.S. companies and able to communicate clearly and professionally.



DO NOT DIRECT MESSAGE--> Please
:  



Preferred Experience



Real estate transaction coordination



Experience working with title companies



Familiarity with land deals or vacant land



Basic photo editing skills



Experience using spreadsheets or CRM systems

title: Social Media Engagement Assistant for Parenting Startup
description:
Hi! I’m the founder of a new parenting platform called ACTIQO that helps families evaluate whether their kids’ activities are worth the time, cost, and energy.



I’m looking for a part-time Social Media Engagement Assistant to help participate in conversations and engage with parents across social media platforms.



This role focuses on community engagement and discussion, not marketing strategy.



You will help keep conversations active around parenting topics such as kids activities, sports schedules, family time, and parenting stress.



?



Platforms Used



You should be comfortable engaging on:



• Instagram

•

• LinkedIn

• Reddit

• Pinterest



Experience with parenting communities or lifestyle discussions is a plus.



?



Responsibilities



Daily tasks may include:



• Replying to comments on social media posts

• Commenting thoughtfully on parenting discussions

• Engaging in Reddit parenting communities

• Posting and interacting with Pinterest pins

• Asking questions that help start conversations

• Participating in
 parenting groups

• Helping maintain a friendly and conversational tone online



The goal is to build authentic conversations with parents, not spam promotion.



?



Requirements



• Strong written English

• Familiar with major social media platforms

• Comfortable writing conversational replies

• Friendly and curious personality

• Reliable and consistent



Bonus if you:



• are a parent

• participate in parenting communities

• understand Reddit and Pinterest engagement



?



Hours



1–2 hours per day

Flexible schedule



?



Pay



$2-4/hour depending on experience.



?



Application Instructions



Please include the word ACTIQO in your application so I know you read the entire post.



Also answer the following questions:



1?? Have you used Reddit before? If so, what communities do you participate in?

2?? Have you ever created or posted Pinterest pins?

3?? Write a reply to this comment:



“Kids sports schedules are exhausting.”

title: Freelance Roof Measurement Specialist
description:
About This Role

We’re a residential roofing technology company building the infrastructure layer for how homeowners get roofing work quoted and completed. We need experienced roof measurement specialists to join our on-demand bench — delivering aerial roof outlines and full measurement reports on a per-task basis with fast turnaround.

This is not a full-time role. We’re building a bench of 3–4 specialists who each handle 4–5 tasks per day during their available hours. You’ll be notified when a task is ready, complete it within our response SLA, and get paid per completed task. Think of it as steady, predictable micro-work that fits around your existing measurement or estimating business.

What You’ll Do

Task 1: Aerial Roof Outline

Receive an alert with a property address (Sydney metro)

Open aerial imagery, locate the property, and manually trace the roof outline

Save the outline in the format we specify (simple polygon export)

Typical time: 2–3 minutes per property

Response SLA: Under 5 minutes from alert

Task 2: Full Roof Measurement Report

Using your measurement software, produce a detailed roof report including total roof area, pitch, number of planes, ridges, hips, valleys, and eave lengths

Output a PDF or standard report format we can pass to contractors for quoting

Typical time: 15–25 minutes per property depending on complexity

Response SLA: Under 30 minutes from alert

Compensation will vary between tasks but will be set fees per task. Must be experienced in full BOQ roof measurmeents. 

Outline < 5 min, Report < 30 min



Rate depends on complexity (storeys, roof planes, hip vs gable). We’ll agree on a standard rate per complexity band after your trial tasks.

Expected volume to start: 4–5 tasks per specialist per day during your active hours. Volume is growing — early specialists who demonstrate reliability will get first priority on increased volume.

Coverage Hours We Need

We need coverage across the full Sydney business day and evening. You tell us which hours you’re available, and we slot you into our coverage roster. We’re building a bench where specialists’ hours complement each other — no single person needs to cover everything.

Shift Window

AEST Hours

Priority

Morning

7:00 AM – 1:00 PM

High

Afternoon

1:00 PM – 7:00 PM

High

Evening

7:00 PM – 10:00 PM

Medium



You don’t need to be exclusively available during your shift — you can run your own measurement business simultaneously. But when an alert comes in during your hours, we need you to respond within the SLA. If you can’t take a task, you decline it immediately and it cascades to the next specialist.

Requirements

Must Have

Experience with aerial roof measurement using any major platform (Nearmap, EagleView, Applicad, RoofSnap, Hover, RoofScopeX, or similar)

Your own software license — we don’t provide software. You use whatever tools you’re fastest and most accurate with

Ability to produce a standardised measurement report (PDF or CSV) that includes: total roof area (m²), pitch (degrees), plane count, ridge/hip/valley/eave lengths

Reliable internet connection and the ability to receive push notifications (Slack or SMS) during your committed hours

Consistent sub-5-minute response for outlines and sub-30-minute response for measurement reports during your shift

ABN for invoicing (Australian-based contractors) OR international invoicing capability

Nice to Have

Experience with Australian residential roofing (tile, Colorbond, slate)

Familiarity with Nearmap specifically (our primary imagery source)

Quantity surveying or estimating background

Experience producing BOQ (Bill of Quantities) reports for roofing contractors

Availability across multiple shift windows

How It Works

Apply with your experience, software stack, and available hours

Complete 3 paid trial tasks so we can assess accuracy, speed, and output format

If approved, you’re added to our coverage roster for your chosen shift(s)

When a task comes in during your shift, you receive a push alert with the property address and task type

You acknowledge the alert (first-to-claim), complete the task, and upload your output

We review, and payment is processed weekly for all completed tasks

Why This Works for You

Steady, predictable task flow — we’re building consistent volume, not one-off gigs

Use your own tools — work in whatever software you’re already licensed for and fastest with

Flexible hours — you pick your shift windows and work around your existing business

Fast payment — weekly settlement, no chasing invoices

Growth path — as our volume increases, reliable specialists get first access to more work and potential retainer arrangements

Simple work — we handle sales, customer management, and everything else. You just measure roofs.

To Apply

Send us a short message with:

Your measurement software and experience level

Example measurement report (any property — we just want to see your output format)

Your available hours (AEST) and which shift windows you can cover

Your per-task rate expectation (or confirm you’re comfortable with the ranges above)

title: Lead Generation Specialist – Freight Brokerage
description:
Position Overview



The Lead Generation Specialist plays a critical role in supporting the growth of the freight brokerage by identifying and researching companies that require freight transportation services. This position focuses on building a consistent pipeline of qualified prospects for the freight sales team by identifying shipping companies, researching logistics decision-makers, and organizing detailed prospect lists for sales outreach.



The Lead Generation Specialist ensures that the sales team has a steady flow of potential customers to contact and pursue. By identifying companies that regularly move freight, the Lead Generation Specialist helps accelerate customer acquisition and supports the brokerage’s ability to expand into multiple freight markets.



This role requires strong research ability, organization, and the ability to identify high-value opportunities within the logistics and transportation industry.



?



Purpose of the Role



The primary purpose of this role is to identify and qualify companies that ship freight, allowing the sales team to focus on closing new freight opportunities and building long-term shipping relationships.



The Lead Generation Specialist supports the overall business development strategy by ensuring that potential customers are consistently identified and added to the sales pipeline.



?



Core Responsibilities



The Lead Generation Specialist is responsible for researching and identifying companies that require freight transportation services across multiple industries and geographic markets.



Key responsibilities include:



• Researching companies that regularly ship freight

• Identifying importers, manufacturers, distributors, and retailers that require transportation services

• Locating logistics managers, shipping coordinators, and supply chain decision-makers

• Building detailed prospect lists including company names, contact information, and industry data

• Identifying freight lanes and shipping patterns when possible

• Supporting the freight sales team with organized prospect lists for outreach

• Maintaining accurate records of research activity and prospect data using company systems



?



Industries and Companies Targeted



The Lead Generation Specialist will research companies across a wide range of industries that regularly move freight, including:



• Manufacturing companies

• Retail distributors

• Import/export businesses

• Furniture companies

• Automotive parts companies

• Food and beverage importers

• Industrial suppliers



Many of these companies move freight through major U.S. ports and logistics hubs such as:



• Savannah

• Charleston

• Los Angeles

• Houston

• New York / New Jersey



The Lead Generation Specialist will help identify potential customers operating in these and other major freight markets.



?



Tools and Research Methods



The Lead Generation Specialist will utilize online research tools and databases to identify potential customers. These may include:



• LinkedIn

• Business directories

• Online company databases

• Google research

• Industry directories

• Import/export databases when available



Strong internet research and data organization skills are essential for success in this role.



?



Expected Output



The Lead Generation Specialist is expected to generate a steady stream of qualified prospects for the sales team.



Typical weekly targets include:



• 100–200 qualified company leads

• Verified contact information for logistics decision-makers

• Organized lead lists ready for sales outreach



Lead quality is critical, as accurate research allows the sales team to focus on companies most likely to require freight transportation services.



?



Contribution to Business Growth



The Lead Generation Specialist plays a foundational role in the growth of the brokerage by ensuring that the sales team has access to a consistent pipeline of potential shipping customers.



By identifying and organizing high-quality prospects, this role enables the freight sales team to focus on building relationships, securing freight lanes, and generating revenue for the company.



The effectiveness of the lead generation function directly supports the company’s ability to expand into new freight markets and increase shipping volume over time.

title: Owner-Operator & Driver Recruiter
description:
Position Overview



The Owner-Operator and Driver Recruiter is responsible for identifying, recruiting, and onboarding truck drivers and owner-operators who can haul freight for the company’s freight brokerage operations throughout the United States.



This role focuses on building a reliable and scalable network of drivers capable of moving freight across multiple freight markets including ports, regional freight corridors, and national shipping lanes.



The recruiter will proactively identify independent drivers, small trucking companies, and owner-operators interested in hauling loads for the brokerage. The recruiter will maintain a database of available drivers and ensure the operations team has access to qualified transportation capacity when freight opportunities arise.



This position plays a critical role in ensuring the brokerage has access to the transportation capacity needed to support customer shipments.



?



Purpose of the Role



The primary purpose of the Driver Recruiter is to continuously build and maintain a network of qualified drivers and owner-operators who are capable of hauling freight secured by the brokerage’s sales team.



By maintaining a reliable pool of drivers, the recruiter helps ensure the company can fulfill freight commitments quickly and efficiently.



?



Key Responsibilities



The Owner-Operator and Driver Recruiter will be responsible for sourcing, contacting, and onboarding truck drivers who are capable of hauling freight in the United States.



Responsibilities include:



• Identifying and contacting independent truck drivers and owner-operators

• Recruiting small trucking companies interested in hauling freight

• Posting driver recruitment advertisements on driver job boards and trucking forums

• Contacting drivers through phone,
, and online platforms

• Maintaining a database of qualified drivers and trucking companies

• Assisting with the onboarding process for drivers who join the network

• Maintaining ongoing communication with drivers to confirm availability

• Tracking recruitment activity using the company’s operational tools



The recruiter will work closely with operations to ensure that freight loads can be matched with available drivers.



?



Driver Types Recruited



The recruiter will primarily focus on recruiting:



• Owner-operators with their own trucks

• Independent truck drivers

• Small trucking companies with multiple trucks

• Regional carriers capable of handling specific freight lanes



These drivers may handle:



• Truckload freight (FTL)

• Port drayage freight

• Regional freight lanes

• Long-haul freight



?



Recruitment Sources



Drivers may be recruited through several channels, including:



• Trucking
 groups

• Driver job boards

• Owner-operator forums

• Trucking communities and online networks

• Direct outreach to small trucking companies



The recruiter must be comfortable proactively reaching out to drivers and carriers to introduce the company and explain available freight opportunities.



?



Operational Tracking



All recruitment activity must be documented using the company’s operational tools.



The recruiter will track:



• Drivers contacted

• Driver contact information

• Equipment type (truck and trailer type)

• Freight lanes the driver prefers

• Availability and geographic coverage



Maintaining accurate records ensures the operations team can quickly identify drivers capable of hauling specific loads.



?



Weekly Performance Expectations



Typical weekly performance targets include:



• Contacting 30–50 drivers or trucking companies

• Recruiting 3–5 qualified owner-operators into the company network

• Expanding the driver database continuously



Over time, the recruiter will build a large and reliable network of drivers capable of covering multiple freight markets.



?



Geographic Freight Markets



The brokerage may operate across multiple U.S. freight markets. Initial operations may focus on freight hubs such as:



• Savannah

• Charleston

• Los Angeles

• Houston

• New York / New Jersey



Drivers may operate in regional lanes or long-haul routes depending on their equipment and operating preferences.



?



Required Skills



Candidates for this role should have:



• Strong communication skills

• Experience recruiting contractors or drivers (preferred)

• Ability to organize and track driver information

• Comfort contacting drivers and trucking companies



Helpful experience includes:



• Trucking industry knowledge

• Logistics industry experience

• Driver recruitment experience



?



Contribution to Company Growth



The Owner-Operator and Driver Recruiter is essential to ensuring that freight secured by the sales team can be successfully transported.



By continuously expanding the driver network, this role ensures the brokerage has the capacity needed to move freight efficiently and maintain reliable service for shipping customers.



A strong driver network allows the company to grow into new freight markets while maintaining a small and efficient operational structure.

title: AI Automation – Architecting a Proposal Generation Workflow
description:
Project Overview:

I am seeking an experienced AI Automation Engineer to review and eventually deploy an end-to-end AI-powered workflow for an architectural firm. The goal is to automate the "Bid & Proposal" phase—from opportunity identification and RFP analysis to conceptual design, fee calculation, and final submission.



The Workflow:

The attached PDF outlines a high-level hypothetical workflow. It involves:

- Data Ingestion: Scanning tender portals and industry news.

- NLP & Extraction: Analyzing RFPs to extract deliverables and criteria.

- Knowledge Management: Compiling internal project history and team profiles.

- Estimation & Pricing: Using historical data to suggest project timelines and fee ranges.

- Content Generation: Drafting executive summaries and technical methodologies in a consistent brand voice.

CRM Integration: Automatic record-keeping and follow-up scheduling.



Your Role:

1. Feasibility Audit: Review the attached workflow and tell me: Is this fully doable with current AI agents and automation tools (e.g., Make.com, LangChain, OpenAI API, Custom GPTs)?

2. Clarification: If you see gaps or need more technical detail to provide an accurate plan, please list your questions so I can consult with the client.

3. Deployment Quote: Provide a rough estimate for a phased deployment.

4. Timeframe: Provide an estimated timeline from development to testing.



Requirements:

- Proven experience with LLM orchestration (LangChain, AutoGPT, or similar).

- Experience with workflow automation (Make.com, Zapier, or Python-based automation).

- Strong understanding of RAG (Retrieval-Augmented Generation) for using internal firm data.

- Ability to integrate AI outputs with CRMs and online submission portals.

title: Website Developer / Builder
description:
I'm the owner/operator of Cabuya Lodge (
), a family-friendly adventure and yoga retreat center in Cabuya, Costa Rica, offering cozy custom-built cabins, yoga retreats, scuba activities, 200-hour yoga teacher training, and more. The current website is functional but dated (built around 2016), and I need a skilled virtual website developer to either:



Overhaul/redesign the entire site for a modern, fresh look while keeping/improving core functionality, OR

Migrate/extract all existing content and information from 
 (text descriptions, accommodations details, retreat info, gallery images, booking integration links, contact forms, etc.) and rebuild it into a new, professional website that's easier to update and more appealing to guests.



This is primarily a one-time project to get an upgraded site live quickly, with strong potential for ongoing maintenance, content updates, or adding features (e.g., better booking calendar, photo gallery enhancements, SEO improvements) if we work well together.

Estimated timeline: 3–8 weeks depending on scope (full overhaul vs. content migration + redesign).

Hours: Project-based (preferred fixed price) or part-time 15–30 hrs/week during the build phase.

Project Goals / Scope Options (Be clear in your application which you recommend):



Option 1: Full overhaul/redesign – Modernize the design (clean, mobile-responsive, jungle/yoga vibe), improve user experience, fix any outdated elements, and keep or enhance existing features (e.g., Direct-Book integration for reservations, gallery, newsletter signup).

Option 2: Content migration + rebuild – Pull all key info from the current site (accommodations pages, retreats, yoga TT details, photos, etc.) and transfer it to a new platform/site without losing anything important, then add modern touches.

Must be fully responsive, fast-loading, SEO-optimized basics, secure, and easy for me (non-tech) to make small future edits.

I'll provide access to the current site (likely login/ftp), content files if available, and any new photos/text.



The rest of the job description (responsibilities, required skills, nice-to-haves, compensation/how to apply) can stay mostly the same as before, but tweak these parts for better fit:

Key Responsibilities (Updated bullets):



Review and analyze the existing 
 site for strengths/weaknesses.

Propose a plan: Either overhaul the current setup or migrate content to a new build.

Design and develop the improved website (wireframes/mockups first if needed).

Extract/migrate all important content (text, images, links, booking features) accurately—no information loss.

Integrate or improve key elements like the external booking system (direct-book.com), contact forms, gallery, etc.

Ensure mobile-friendly, fast performance, basic SEO, and Google Analytics setup.

Provide full handover: logins, backups, simple training video/docs for updates.

Optional ongoing: Monthly updates, security checks, or new pages (e.g., upcoming retreats calendar).



Required Skills & Experience (Add/emphasize):



Proven experience overhauling or redesigning existing websites (not just building new ones—share examples of "before/after" if possible).

Expertise in WordPress (preferred for easy ongoing edits, with Elementor/Pro or similar builder) or other suitable platforms (Shopify if heavy booking focus, Webflow for design-heavy).

Comfortable migrating content from older sites (scraping/exporting text/images, handling outdated code).

Good eye for tropical/nature/yoga retreat aesthetics (clean, serene, inviting—reference similar lodge/retreat sites).

Bonus: Experience with booking integrations (e.g., Direct-Book, Calendly, WooCommerce), galleries, or retreat/yoga sites.

title: ???? Claude AI Developer (Project-Based, with Long-Term Potential) — Remote
description:
Hi, I'm Daniel and I'm looking for someone to build things together with me for my company and myself. 



I've already built several automations and internal tools using Python, n8n, Google Drive, and Trello. Now I want to take things further and Claude AI is at the center of that.



???? WHAT WE'LL BUILD TOGETHER

• Prompt Engineering — Building reliable, reusable system prompts for specific agency use cases (social media, scripts, strategy docs)

? YOU'RE THE RIGHT FIT IF YOU...

- Can read a written brief and execute independently 

- Are comfortable in Python and/or JavaScript/React

- Understand REST APIs, webhooks, and JSON-based data flows

- Have hands-on experience with n8n specifically

- Communicate clearly and proactively in English

- Deliver on time or flag problems early



???? HOW THIS WORKS



This starts project-based. Each project comes with a written brief, clear deliverables, and a deadline. No daily standups but I'm always available for questions at the start of a project and also in the middle of it. 



If we work well together, I'd love to turn this into an ongoing collaboration. I'm building something long-term and I want a developer who grows with it :) 



???? TO APPLY, PLEASE SEND:

title: ComfyUI AI Workflow Developer – Static E-Commerce Ads
description:
About Us:

We are an e-commerce business focused on creating high-impact, visually appealing ads for our products. To scale our creative production, we are looking for an AI workflow specialist who can leverage ComfyUI to automate the generation of static ad creatives.



Role Overview:

We are seeking a talented AI/ComfyUI developer to design and implement a workflow that can generate professional, high-quality static ads for multiple products. Your solution should allow us to quickly produce creative variations with minimal manual input — while maintaining consistent branding, style, and high visual quality.



Responsibilities:



- Design, build, and optimize a ComfyUI workflow that generates static ad creatives (image-based).

- Ensure the workflow allows for easy input of product images, branding assets, and copy text.

- Automate as much of the process as possible (style consistency, image compositing, layout).

- Deliver clean, documented workflows that our team can easily reuse and modify.

- Provide basic training or documentation on how to run and update the workflow.



Requirements:



- Proven experience with ComfyUI or other node-based AI workflow tools.

- Solid understanding of Stable Diffusion pipelines and image generation models.

- Knowledge of prompt engineering and style control for product-focused imagery.

- Familiarity with e-commerce ad design principles (preferred).

- Ability to deliver a scalable, repeatable solution and meet deadlines.



Nice-to-Have:



- Experience with ControlNet, LoRA, or other model fine-tuning techniques.

- Background in design or creative direction.

- Experience automating workflows with APIs or scripting.



What We Offer:



- Competitive freelance/contract rate.

- Flexible working schedule (remote).

- Opportunity to work on a practical, creative AI project with room for innovation.



How to Apply:



Please send us:



- A short introduction about yourself and your experience with ComfyUI or similar tools.

- Examples of previous AI-generated creative work (portfolio or samples).

- Your estimated timeline and rate for building this workflow.

This is not a basic virtual assistant role. We are looking for someone who is structured, proactive, and capable of managing operational workflows.



?



Main Responsibilities



1. Website Management (WooCommerce)



You will manage product pages for our e-commerce websites.



Responsibilities include:



• uploading products

• improving product titles

• writing product descriptions

• adding SEO titles and meta descriptions

• ensuring product photos and prices are correct

• auditing existing product pages



Each product page should include:



• strong product title

• short product introduction

• product details or specifications

• SEO title

• meta description



?



2. Operations Task Tracking



You will maintain the company’s Master Task Tracker.



Responsibilities include:



• tracking tasks across departments

• updating task status

• following up with team members

• ensuring deadlines are met

• reporting pending tasks



This role helps ensure the business runs in an organized and structured way.



?



3. Marketing Coordination



You will help track marketing activities.



Responsibilities include:



• tracking influencer collaborations

• organizing marketing content files

• monitoring social media activity

• collecting marketing performance data



?



4. Advertising Data Tracking



You will collect advertising performance data from our marketing team.



Responsibilities include:



• tracking campaigns

• organizing ad performance reports

• monitoring key metrics such as ROAS



?



5. Weekly Operations Reports



You will prepare simple weekly summaries including:



• website updates

• marketing activity

• pending operational tasks

• issues that need attention



?



Skills Required



• Strong organizational skills

• Experience with Google Sheets / Excel

• Experience with WooCommerce or e-commerce platforms

• Basic understanding of SEO

• Clear written English



?



Preferred Skills



• experience with e-commerce operations

• experience with project management tools

• digital marketing analytics experience



?



Personality Traits



We are looking for someone who is:



• extremely organized

• detail-oriented

• proactive

• comfortable following up with team members

• able to manage multiple systems and workflows



?



Application Instructions



To apply, please include:

 1. A short introduction about your experience with operations or e-commerce.

 2. Your experience with WooCommerce or product listings.

 3. Examples of systems, trackers, or operational processes you have managed.



Important:

To confirm you have read this job description carefully, please start your application with the word “Structure.”

title: Research Assistant – Real Estate
description:
JOB TYPE: Part-time (10-15 hours/week to start)

RATE: $3-5/hour to start, with performance reviews at 30 and 60 days for increases



ABOUT ME:

I'm managing several projects: potential Florida relocation, finding affordable housing for a senior family member in Philadelphia, and home renovations. I need a detail-oriented researcher who can help me make better decisions faster.

I value quality over quantity, attention to detail, and honest feedback. If you take pride in thorough work, we'll work well together.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

- Research Philadelphia properties for a senior family member (under $500/month all-in)

- Find housing programs/grants for seniors

- Research Jacksonville, FL multifamily properties

- Source contractors (drywall, cabinets, general labor)

- Organize findings in clean spreadsheets

- Flag concerns – I want your honest assessment, not just data



WHY WORK WITH ME:

- Weekly task packets sent Sundays – clear expectations

- No micro-management – I care about output, not hours

- Feedback & questions answered within 48 hours

- Long-term potential

- Rate increases at 30/60 days for strong performance



COMMUNICATION:

- Asynchronous preferred (no real-time chat required)

- Video/voice notes welcome (WhatsApp - preferred)

- Task packets Fridays, due following Friday 12pm Eastern



TO APPLY:

Complete the test below and include with your application. No test = not considered.

---

TEST: Philadelphia Senior Housing



Find 2 Philadelphia properties where a senior could live affordably.



REAL CONSTRAINTS:

- Senior lives on ~$900-1,000/month government benefits

- TOTAL monthly cost MUST be under $500 (mortgage + taxes + insurance + HOA)

- Walkability matters: grocery, pharmacy, bus stop within reasonable distance

- Current situation is rough – anything better is an improvement



FINANCING (CRITICAL):

- Must qualify for CONVENTIONAL financing (FHA/conventional loan)

- NO cash-only, NO hard money, NO as-is (unless minor cosmetics)

- Watch for "cash only," "investor special," "as-is" in listings

- NO land leases – must own the land



CALCULATIONS (use for both properties):

- 5% down, 30-year fixed, 6.8% interest

- Property taxes: 1.5% of price annually

- Insurance: $800/year estimate

- Add HOA if applicable

- TOTAL must be UNDER $500



SCENARIO A – Senior Only

- Target price: UNDER $80,000

- Single family house or condo

- Senior occupies full property



SCENARIO B – Multifamily with Rental Offset

- Target price: UNDER $100,000 (maybe higher if numbers work)

- Duplex/triplex where senior occupies one unit, others rented

- Senior's portion of total cost must be UNDER $500

- Other units must rent for enough to cover their share



SPREADSHEET COLUMNS:



| Address | Price | Type | Walk Assessment (what's nearby?) | Financing Red Flags? | Total Monthly Cost | Senior's Portion (if multi) | Your Assessment |



YOUR ASSESSMENT COLUMN:

Write 2-3 sentences. Be honest:

- What works well for a senior here?

- What concerns you?

- Would you feel okay having a family member live here? Why or why not?



I want your real opinion, not what you think I want to hear. Red flags help me avoid mistakes.



PART B – Quick Questions (answer briefly):

1. What was hardest about finding properties under $500/month?

2. What's ONE question you'd ask me before deeper research?



FORMAT:

- Google Sheets or Excel

- Links must work

- Show your math or use formulas

- Double-check total under $500



SUBJECT LINE: "Research Assistant – [Your Name] – Philly Test"



NEXT STEPS:

1. Submit with test

2. Top candidates get PAID trial (4-6 hours real work, paid regardless)

3. If trial goes well ? ongoing work



I'm looking for a long-term partner. If that's you, I look forward to your test.

title: Social Media Manager + Video Editor
description:
We're a fast-growing Dutch sleep brand selling chamomile nasal strips and mouth tape across Europe and the US. Our products help people wake up energized through better nasal breathing — and we need someone to help us tell that story on TikTok and Instagram.



What you'll do:

You own everything. Research content angles, write scripts, edit videos with AI voiceover, and post 2x per day across TikTok and Instagram — all without being told what to make. You study the brand, study the audience, and figure out what will perform. The founder approves before anything goes live. That's the only checkpoint.

Content runs two formats: relatable/humor and educational sleep content. You decide the mix based on what's working.



You're a fit if you:

- Have independently run social accounts for brands and grown them (show us the numbers)

- Can research a brand and start producing on-brand content within days — no hand-holding

- Write your own scripts and edit your own videos using AI voiceover tools (ElevenLabs, CapCut AI, or similar)

- Understand hooks, retention, and what makes short-form content actually convert

- Are available to start asap



What we offer:

- Remote, fully flexible hours

- You run the show — minimal back and forth

- Room to grow as the brand scales internationally

- Competitive pay based on experience



To apply: send us the TikTok and Instagram accounts of brands you currently manage or have managed. No portfolio = no response.

title: Automation Expert for YT CONTENT
description:
We are looking for a YouTube content automation expert who can build or operate efficient, low-cost systems for producing YouTube videos at scale.



The goal is maximum output with minimal manual work and minimal cost per video.

If you know how to combine AI tools, automation workflows, and simple editing pipelines, this role is for you.



We are not looking for traditional editors or agencies. We are specifically looking for people who understand automation and scalable production.



Responsibilities



You will help create and automate production pipelines for YouTube videos such as:



• AI voice generation

• Script-to-video automation

• Image or video generation

• Automatic editing workflows

• Subtitle automation

• Thumbnail generation

• Upload pipelines



Example workflow you might build or operate:



Script ? AI Voice ? Visuals ? Editing ? Subtitles ? Thumbnail ? Upload



The goal is to make the process extremely fast and cheap per video.



Compensation



We can work in multiple ways:



• Payment per automation system built

• Payment per video produced

• Revenue share from the channels powered by your automation



Yes — if your system generates revenue, you can earn a percentage of it.



We are building long-term partnerships, not just short gigs.



I'd love to see your messages ;) Fun fact: my ig social media handle is what you'd get if you combined a snake programming language (first 2 letters) + "tek" + underscore. So if you're smart you know what to do with that information and how to connect ;)

title: Collection Contractor
description:

This role processes all collections notices and assists members with collection issues, offering guidance on repayment options while maintaining positive member relationships with strong communication, attention to detail, and problem-solving skills. 

 

This is full-time, Monday-Friday 8:00AM CST – 8:00PM CST (hours that collections can be operated, not mandatory 12 hour days) 



 

Pay - The salary range for this role is $3.50-$5.00 per hour based on experience. With potential of increases for performance.

 



Job Duties and Responsibilities

- Manage customers who are resistant to agent contact by remaining polite, tactful, honest, and firm 

- Managing automated calls and
s

title: Business Development Executive
description:
About the Role



ASJ IT Solutions is looking for a driven and resourceful Business Development Executive to help expand our client base and drive new revenue opportunities.





This is a founding sales role, where you will play a key part in building the company’s early portfolio of clients and long-term partnerships. You will identify prospects, initiate conversations, understand client needs, and convert opportunities into successful engagements.





You will work closely with business leaders to understand their challenges and guide them toward the right technology solutions across Cybersecurity, AI Integration, Software Development, and IT Infrastructure.





This role is ideal for someone who enjoys prospecting, relationship-building, and closing deals, and who thrives in a startup environment where initiative, ownership, and results matter.







About ASJ IT Solutions



ASJ IT Solutions is a technology services company focused on helping organizations build secure, scalable, and future-ready digital environments.





Our services include:

Cybersecurity

AI Integration

Software Development

IT Infrastructure Solutions





We work with growing businesses to design practical and reliable technology solutions that support their operations and digital transformation initiatives.





Key Responsibilities







End-to-End Sales Ownership



Own the full sales cycle from prospecting and lead generation through discovery, proposal development, negotiation, and deal closure

Build and manage a healthy pipeline of opportunities

Identify and reach out to potential SME clients through outbound outreach, networking, referrals, and events.





Client Engagement



Conduct discovery conversations with business owners and decision-makers

Understand client challenges and recommend suitable technology solutions

Present ASJ IT Solutions’ services in clear business terms





Sales Execution



Prepare or assist with proposals, quotations, and follow-ups

Coordinate internally after deals are closed to ensure smooth project delivery

Maintain proper tracking of leads and opportunities





Relationship Development



Build long-term relationships with clients and partners

Identify opportunities for repeat business, upselling, and partnerships

Represent the company professionally in meetings, networking events, conferences, and site visits when required





Preferred Qualifications



2–5 years of experience in B2B sales, business development, account management, or solution selling

Experience in IT services, SaaS, cybersecurity, cloud, telecom, or related industries is preferred

Strong communication and presentation skills

Comfortable with lead generation and outbound prospecting

Ability to explain technical solutions in simple business language

Organized in managing leads, follow-ups, and opportunities

Comfortable working in a startup environment where initiative and accountability are important





Technology & Tools



We value candidates who are comfortable using modern tools to improve productivity and sales effectiveness.

Preferred familiarity with:

CRM tools (HubSpot, Notion, or similar)

LinkedIn and digital prospecting tools

LLM/AI tools (e.g., ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) for research, outreach preparation, and productivity





Work Requirements



Willing to work in a hybrid setup (Lucena City, Quezon based)

Willing to attend client meetings, networking events, conferences, and site visits

Must have a reliable laptop and stable internet connection





Compensation



Fixed base salary

Uncapped commission based on deals closed

Details to be discussed during the hiring process

title: Social Media Chat Specialist
description:
I run a social media management business that works with online influencers, and I’m looking for someone who deeply understands Gen-Z internet communication.

Your role will involve managing conversations on behalf of influencers, responding to messages and keeping interactions natural, engaging, and entertaining.

A big part of this role is also helping influencers monetize their audience by naturally introducing and recommending the products or offers they have available.

This requires someone who can hold conversations, be funny and engaging, and smoothly guide people toward things the influencer is promoting — without sounding pushy or corporate.

You should be comfortable writing in a Gen-Z texting style, similar to how people communicate on platforms like TikTok, Instagram, Snapchat and
/X.

This is not a corporate customer support role. The messaging style needs to feel like a real person texting, not a business responding to customers.

If your writing style sounds like formal
s or customer support replies, this role will likely not be a good fit.



What You'll Be Doing

• Managing conversations on behalf of influencers

• Responding to messages and maintaining active conversations

• Keeping conversations engaging, funny, and entertaining

• Building ongoing relationships through chat. Keeping notes on every lead.

• Naturally recommending and promoting influencer products or offers during conversations

• Helping drive engagement and sales through chat interactions

• Communicating in a natural Gen-Z texting style



Messaging Style (Very Important)

You will be writing messages on behalf of young influencers, so your writing style must match how people in their early twenties communicate online.

Messages should feel like casual texting, not formal writing.

This typically includes:

• lowercase texting

• casual conversational tone

• internet slang

• natural emoji use

• short messages

• social media communication style

Example tone (do not copy exactly)

heyyy what brings u here ????

wait why did u disappear ????

lmaoo ur actually funny

just bcos im an influencer doesnt mean im dumb lmao i acc know what im talking about ????????Think tiktok language. 



If your writing style sounds like this:

Hello, how are you today?

Thank you for your message.

Then this role will not be the right fit.



Requirements

• Excellent written English

• Strong understanding of Gen-Z internet culture

• Comfortable with online sales and persuasion in chat

• Familiar with TikTok / Instagram / Reddit communication styles

• Fast typing speed

• Ability to manage conversations for extended periods

• Reliable internet connection and computer



Bonus if you’re familiar with:

• Discord communities

• meme culture

• online communities

• influencer marketing



Personality I'm Looking For

• Quick learner

• Observant and socially aware

• Naturally playful in conversation

• Comfortable with persuasion and sales in chat

• Competitive and motivated by results

• Reliable and consistent



Compensation

• Competitive weekly salary

• Performance bonuses based on results

• Opportunity to grow into Team Leader / Trainer



Application Test

Please answer the following in Gen-Z texting style.

Scenario 1

Someone new sends their first message. How would you greet them?

Scenario 2

Someone stops replying in the middle of a conversation. What would you say to bring them back?

At the top of your application, write the number 82 so I know you read the full job post.

Scenario 3

Someone asks what the influencer is currently working on. How would you keep the conversation interesting?

Your answers should feel casual and natural, like texting a friend.

Avoid formal language.

Scenario 4

Someone says the product is too expensive, how would you respond?



Bonus Question

What internet trends, memes, or TikTok trends do you think are popular right now?



The ideal candidate for this is chronically online, younger and has grown up with the internet around them and knows everything about genz culture, more specifically feminine genz culture.



Any responses that seem AI will immediately be evident and the application will not be considered.

title: Social Media Specialist
description:
About Us:

At 4ocean, our mission is to save the world's oceans, and we are looking for passionate individuals to help us achieve this goal. We are more than just a company; we are a global movement committed to making a tangible difference in the health of our planet. We achieve this by removing plastic waste from the ocean and coastlines and advocating for sustainable change. If you are driven by purpose, motivated to contribute to a cause that truly matters, and eager to make a lasting impact on the environment, we want you on our team.



Role Overview

The Social Media Specialist creates, adapts, and deploys high-quality creative that performs across TikTok Paid, Meta Paid, YouTube, Google (Demand Gen/YouTube/Display), Yelp 1P, DTC,
/SMS, and third-party marketplaces.

We’re looking for a self-governing, fast, commercially minded creator who understands that creative is a core performance lever. You should be comfortable operating with minimal direction while staying aligned to brand guardrails, campaign priorities, and performance feedback.

AI is central to the workflow, but human judgment, brand sensibility and final creative control always sit on top. This role sits inside the paid performance engine, where speed, consistency and quality matter as much as ideas.



What You’ll Do

Paid Strategy & Planning

Support execution of performance-driven paid creative strategy.

Maintain weekly/monthly creative calendars aligned to campaigns and launches.

Translate briefs from Paid Media, Ecommerce and Marketing into platform-ready creative for TikTok, Meta, YouTube, Google, Yelp 1P, DTC,
/SMS and marketplaces.

Propose creative angles, formats and tests based on performance trends.



Paid Creative Production

Produce platform-native assets including:

Short-form vertical video (TikTok, Reels, Shorts)

Mid-form YouTube creative

Static images and carousels

UGC-style performance video

Write conversion-oriented hooks, captions and CTAs.

Optimize creative for pacing, framing, text density and platform best practices.

Ensure all work meets brand standards while feeling native to each channel.



AI-Powered Workflow

Use AI tools for hook generation, A/B testing, video editing, thumbnail/caption variants and rapid iteration at scale.

Balance efficiency with brand integrity, treating AI as a production amplifier, not the decision maker.



Publishing, QA & Alignment

Prepare assets to exact specs for Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google, Yelp and marketplaces.

Partner closely with Paid Media teams/agencies for smooth implementation.

Maintain organized asset libraries and clear naming conventions.

Ecommerce & Marketplace Integration

Design creative that supports conversion and product discovery.

Align timing and messaging with DTC promotions, paid campaigns,
/SMS and marketplace initiatives.

Ensure marketplace assets meet platform requirements while preserving brand consistency.



Performance & Learning

Review results including CTR, CPC, CPA, CPV, hook rate, watch time and view-through signals.

Refine storytelling, structure and hooks based on data.

Share concise creative learnings with stakeholders.



Collaboration & Trends

Work cross-functionally with Paid Media, Ecommerce, Marketing and Creative teams.

Stay current on platform updates and ad best practices across Meta, TikTok, YouTube, Google and Yelp.



You Bring

2–5 years of experience in paid social creative, performance content, or e-commerce marketing.

Proven track record of high-performing short-form video and static paid assets.

Experience working with paid teams or agencies preferred.

Familiarity with YouTube and Google ad formats is a strong plus.

Comfort owning workflows and deliverables with minimal supervision.

Working knowledge of CTR, CPC, CPA, CPV, and hook rate.

Highly organized with strong attention to detail.

A portfolio demonstrating TikTok, Meta, YouTube and ecommerce-oriented paid creative is required.

Tools

Native ad tools across Meta, TikTok, Google, YouTube and Yelp.

Canva, CapCut, Adobe Creative Suite, or equivalent.

Hands-on experience with AI creative tools for variation and testing.

Ability to build scalable, repeatable creative workflows.

What Success Looks Like

Consistent delivery of high-quality, campaign-ready creative.

Reliable, on-time handoffs to Paid Media teams.

Improving creative efficiency and performance over time.

Clear contribution to paid-driven traffic and revenue across TikTok, Meta, YouTube, Google and Yelp 1P.

Ability to interpret SEMrush data and translate it into actionable insights and strategies.

Experience in creating reports and dashboards that effectively communicate SEMrush findings to various teams.

Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills, with the ability to prioritise recommendations based on impact.

title: Bilingual Medical Expert
description:
Job Title: Bilingual Medical Expert

Job Type: Contract (Full-time or Part-time)

Location: Remote



Job Summary:



Join our customer's team as a Bilingual Medical Expert and play a pivotal role in shaping the future of AI-driven healthcare. In this intellectually stimulating role, you will design complex, verifiable, and time-resistant medical question–answer pairs from multiple reputable sources to rigorously train next-generation AI models. This is an exceptional opportunity to blend your clinical expertise with cutting-edge technology, directly impacting the accuracy and reliability of AI in medicine.







Key Responsibilities:



- Create challenging, knowledge-based medical question–answer pairs that address gaps in current AI capabilities.

- Research and synthesize content from obscure yet reliable medical sources to formulate questions and justifications.

- Ensure all questions are verifiable, evidence-based, and maintain longevity in relevance.

- Provide detailed, source-backed rationales for each answer to support knowledge traceability.

- Collaborate closely with AI development and data teams to refine training methodologies and improve model performance.

- Communicate findings and complex medical concepts clearly and concisely in both written and verbal formats.

- Continuously monitor advancements in medical science and AI to update content and maintain best practices.





Required Skills and Qualifications:



- Advanced proficiency in Next.js and modern web application development.

- Fluency in at least two languages, with strong command of medical terminology in both.

- Demonstrated experience in medical research, clinical practice, or academic medicine.

- Exceptional written and verbal communication skills with meticulous attention to clarity and detail.

- Ability to identify AI limitations and design questions that reveal knowledge gaps.

- Strong analytical skills and the capacity to synthesize complex information from diverse sources.

- Self-motivated, proactive, and able to thrive in a fully remote environment.





Preferred Qualifications:



- Prior experience in AI training, prompt engineering, or medical informatics.

- Familiarity with multi-source data validation and knowledge engineering.

- Publication or peer review experience in a medical or scientific context.



TO APPLY, Kindly send the ff:

- Full Name 

-
 Address (to contact you)

- bit of background of work experience

- link to Resume

title: Real Estate Virtual Assistant (REVA)
description:
We are looking for a highly organized and proactive Real Estate Virtual Assistant (REVA) to support our growing real estate operations. The ideal candidate should have 1–2 years of proven experience as a real estate VA, excellent communication skills, and the ability to manage lead follow-ups, CRM systems, and digital interactions effectively.



TO APPLY: Please include your resume link and portfolio link. Only candidates with real estate VA experience will be considered.



Key Responsibilities:



Manage and respond to incoming leads promptly and professionally.

Handle direct messages (DMs) across platforms including
, Instagram, LinkedIn, etc.

Maintain community engagement and consistently interact with potential clients.

Manage and update CRM systems such as Follow Up Boss, Go High Level, KVCore, and Trello.

Input new contacts and ensure proper lead management and follow-ups.

Create and maintain an organized CRM system for tracking prospects, contracts, and client communication.

Support social media and digital marketing efforts, including managing inquiries and routing qualified leads.

Assist with graphics, website updates, and social media management (SMM) tasks as needed.

Learn and adapt quickly to new tools, workflows, and real estate systems.



Requirements:



1–2 years of experience as a Real Estate Virtual Assistant or in a similar role.

Strong working knowledge of KVCore, Follow Up Boss, and/or Go High Level (preferred).

Experience managing multiple platforms and responding to messages efficiently.

Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English.

Highly organized, detail-oriented, and quick to learn new systems and processes.

Able to work night shift (PST hours) and available to start immediately.

Must have a reliable device, stable internet connection, and home office setup.

Experience with contracts, basic graphics, website management, and SMM is preferred.

Part time potential to full time after few weeks



TO APPLY: Please include your resume link. Only candidates with real estate VA experience will be considered.

pany page growth

title: Insurance Billing Specialist (Must have Auto experience)
description:
ABOUT THE COMPANY

Our client is an established auto dealership based in the greater Atlanta, Georgia area. The team operates with a strong culture of integrity and accountability, and is growing its virtual support staff to better manage financial operations. This is a close-knit environment where reliable professionals are recognized and given real opportunity to advance.

 

ABOUT THE ROLE

We are hiring on behalf of a U.S.-based auto dealership seeking a detail-oriented and trustworthy Virtual Payments and Insurance Accounts Specialist. This is an additive role joining an existing virtual team, with full ownership of payment processing and insurance account management from day one. The right candidate brings automotive accounts experience, operates with a high degree of integrity, and is ready to grow into an Accounts Manager role over time.

 

RESPONSIBILITIES

1. Manage and process customer and vendor payments accurately and on schedule

2. Oversee insurance accounts, renewals, and documentation for the dealership

3. Maintain organized records of all payment activity and insurance correspondence

4. Coordinate with the owner and internal team on outstanding balances and account status updates

5. Flag discrepancies, issues, or high-priority items requiring immediate attention

6. Support accounts reconciliation and reporting as needed

7. Identify opportunities to improve payment and insurance workflows over time

 

REQUIREMENTS

Must-Have Qualifications

1. 2+ years of experience managing payments, billing, or insurance accounts in an automotive or dealership environment

2. Demonstrated experience in a supervisory or managerial capacity within an accounts or finance function

3. High level of trustworthiness, discretion, and professional integrity

4. Strong attention to detail with a track record of accurate, timely work

5. Reliable internet connection and ability to communicate during U.S. Eastern business hours

 

Preferred Qualifications

1. Experience with auto dealership management systems (e.g., CDK, Reynolds & Reynolds, or similar DMS platforms)

2. Familiarity with insurance account management processes in the U.S. automotive market

3. Proficiency with accounting or payment platforms (e.g., QuickBooks, FreshBooks, or similar tools)

4. Experience working in a virtual or remote capacity with U.S.-based clients

 

KEY TRAITS WE’RE LOOKING FOR

1. Trustworthy and Accountable: Handles sensitive financial and insurance information with full discretion and professionalism.

2. Detail-Oriented: Catches errors before they become problems. Maintains clean, organized records consistently.

3. Proactive Communicator: Surfaces issues early and keeps the team informed without needing to be prompted.

4. Growth-Oriented: Brings a manager’s mindset to the role from day one and is ready to grow into full accounts leadership.

5. Dependable: Shows up, follows through, and delivers on commitments every time.

 

HOW TO APPLY

Interested candidates will complete a pre-recorded video interview and submit their resume for review. Top candidates will be shortlisted and forwarded to our client for final evaluation.

 

This is an opportunity to join a high-trust team where your automotive accounts expertise will be recognized and rewarded with real growth.
