title: Ecom Performance Video Editor | High-Growth | Long-Term
description:
## Role Overview



The purpose of the Video Editor role at Ivy Ecommerce is to transform creative briefs into high-performing video ads that drive conversions at scale.



This is not just a technical editing role.



Our Video Editors are an integral part of the marketing engine. Your job is to understand the psychology, messaging, and strategy behind each ad concept, and bring it to life through sharp editing, pacing, storytelling, and attention to detail.



As a Video Editor, you are responsible for the execution and final polish of our video ads. The success of our marketing team depends on your ability to:



- Understand each creative brief from a performance/direct-response marketing lens

- Assemble visuals, hooks, captions, and pacing in a way that maximizes conversions

- Enhance the core marketing message through smart creative decisions



You understand that small details can be the difference between an ad that gets scaled to millions in spend and one that dies after testing.



Your role is to work closely with our Creative Strategists, actively learn what makes ads win or lose, and help us consistently produce winning ads month over month across our brand portfolio.





### Primary Responsibilities



- Edit and deliver ~10 ad briefs per week

- Collaborate closely with Creative Strategists to ensure each ad concept is executed correctly

- Implement feedback from the creative team and performance data to improve iterations

- Learn and internalize our ad strategy frameworks to understand what makes creatives “win” or “lose”

- Analyze your own creatives to identify what’s working, what isn’t, and how to improve

- Upload and organize final assets into the correct folders and formats for each platform





## Qualifications



### Direct Experience



- 1+ year experience editing eCommerce / performance marketing ads

- Experience working within a team environment and understanding roles in a creative workflow





### Character Traits We Look For



- Extremely high attention to detail – you care about the small things because you know they matter

- Creative + marketing-minded – you’re not just an editor, you’re curious about why ads perform

- Strong visual communicator and storyteller

- High curiosity and a desire to continuously improve your creative and marketing skills

- Willingness to do the “boring but important” work consistently at a high standard

- Clear communicator who collaborates well with a team

- Time-efficient, but willing to put in extra effort when quality demands it

- Hungry, motivated, and growth-oriented – you want to get better, take on more responsibility, and level up your career

- to make sure you are still reading, type “BLUE” in your response title.

- Coachable and open to feedback

- Not a clock-in, clock-out mindset — you care about results and impact







### This Role Is NOT for You If:



- You only want to execute tasks without understanding the marketing behind them

- You’re not interested in learning performance marketing or creative strategy

- You dislike feedback or fast-paced environments

- You’re disorganized or unreliable

- You prefer working solo and don’t enjoy team collaboration

- You’re not motivated to grow your skills and career over time







### Growth & Upside



At Ivy Ecommerce, we invest in people who perform and show initiative. This role has real upside for those who take ownership:



- Opportunity to grow into a Creative Strategist / Creative Lead role over time

- Increased responsibility across multiple brands in our portfolio

- Performance-based bonuses tied to ad spend (no cap)

- Long-term growth path into higher-level marketing and creative leadership roles



This is a long-term opportunity for someone who wants to build a career in performance marketing, creative & be part of building cool ecom brands, not just edit videos.







## ???? How to Apply



To be considered, please reply with:



- A short overview of yourself

- Your CV / Resume with your past work experience

- Your eCommerce video editing portfolio

- Your
 address + WhatsApp number



Then answer the questions below in detail:



1. What about this role excites you most?

2. Why do you believe you’re a strong fit for this role?







Applications that do not follow these instructions or provide detailed answers will not be reviewed.

title: **TOP TIER Accounting  & QBO Manager**
description:
**PLEASE do not contact us in any other way except this posting (No LinkedIn requests, e-mails, calls, etc.)**

**Must send a resume AND a cover letter explaining how you are a good fit for this job and what relevant experience you have ****

**Voice samples are not required but are appreciated**

** NO AGENCIES - WE ONLY WORK DIRECTLY WITH FREELANCERS **

____________________________________________________________________________________________



We are a consulting company based out of New Jersey, USA who provide accounting & other services to our clients. 



We specialize in real estate investing and are looking for someone with direct experience in that area. 



We are hiring for a long-term position. The right candidate will have great attention to detail, can work independently, and is interested in making the business better.



There are opportunities for raises & growth for the right candidate. We really would like someone who can learn quickly and will take a proactive approach to constantly make things better, without being asked.



GOOD or GREAT American/neutral accent is preferred, someone who is familiar with the US work culture or has worked for a US company before.

By letting us know the secret word, we know that you’ve read this job post in full and have high attention to detail.



The working hours are 9:00 – 5:00pm (flexible), based on EST (UTC -5). Any breaks taken are unpaid.



There is an opportunity to learn and grow into new tasks which may lead to more pay increases in the future.

____________________________________________________________________________________________

title: Product Listing Quality Controller
description:
I am looking for a sharp, detail-obsessed Product Listing Quality Controller who can review product listings, identify mistakes, and communicate clear corrections back to the product lister.



Your job is not to create listings from scratch — your job is to think, analyze, catch errors, and improve the system. Over time, this role will help build a repeatable process where listings get better and faster.



You will have a lot of freedom, but punctuality, accuracy, and accountability are mandatory.



What You’ll Do

• Review product titles, images, descriptions, and structure

• Detect mistakes in language, formatting, logic, and compliance

• Clearly inform the product lister what to fix and why

• Suggest improvements to prevent the same mistakes in the future

• Ensure final listings meet quality and consistency standards

• Deliver feedback on time, every time



Must-Have Skills (Non-Negotiable)

• Exceptional attention to detail & common sense

• Strong English comprehension and writing

• Experience with Shopify product listings

• Ability to give clear, structured feedback

• Extremely time-punctual and reliable

• Comfortable working independently with minimal supervision



Not a Good Fit If You

• Miss deadlines or reply late

• Avoid responsibility or decision-making

• Ignore small errors

• Need constant instructions



Application Filter (READ CAREFULLY)



To confirm you read this properly, start your application with this exact line:



“I spot mistakes before they become expensive.”



Applications not starting with this line will be automatically ignored.



After that line, briefly answer:

1. Your experience reviewing or editing product listings

2. How you usually report mistakes to teammates

3. Why punctuality matters in quality control



What You Get

• A lot of freedom in how you work

• Long-term collaboration

• Clear standards, no micromanagement

• Work judged by quality and results.

title: Finance Manager
description:
Finance Manager (Xero) – Remote



Part-Time | 10-20 Hours Per Week | Australian Business Hours Overlap



The Lucy Rose Clinic is an established Australian telehealth clinic specialising in women’s hormonal and thyroid health. We support patients nationwide through practitioner consultations, diagnostic testing, and treatment programs.



We are seeking an experienced Finance Manager to oversee the financial operations of the business and ensure strong financial visibility for leadership.



This role will work closely with our existing bookkeeper and Australian accountants. The accountants handle tax lodgements and grants. Your role is to ensure the books are accurate, financial reporting is reliable, and the business has clear financial insight.



Hours



10 -20 hours per week



Typical schedule:



4 hours per day

Monday to Friday

Partial overlap with Australian business hours preferred

Hourly Rate -

USD $15 per hour



We are seeking a strong Finance Manager who can provide accurate financial oversight and reporting.



Key Responsibilities

Financial Oversight



• Review bookkeeping work in Xero

• Ensure bank accounts and payment platforms are reconciled

• Maintain accurate balance sheet accounts



Financial Reporting



• Prepare monthly Profit & Loss, Balance Sheet and Cashflow reports

• Provide a clear summary of business financial performance

• Track revenue streams and profitability



Cash Flow Monitoring



• Monitor business cash flow

• Identify financial risks early

• Support leadership with financial planning



Payroll & Super Oversight



• Review payroll processing

• Ensure superannuation payments are correct and reconciled



Financial Processes



• Implement a clear month-end financial close process

• Ensure financial records remain accurate and organised



Coordination with Accountants



• Prepare financial data required for tax lodgements

• Support documentation required for grant applications



Bookkeeper Management



• Review the work of the bookkeeper

• Improve processes and financial controls where required



Required Skills



• Strong experience managing Xero-based accounting systems

• Experience preparing P&L, balance sheet and financial reports

• Understanding of cash flow management and financial analysis

• Experience reviewing or managing bookkeeping work

• Excellent attention to detail



Highly Regarded



• Experience working with Australian businesses

• Experience managing service-based or healthcare businesses



How to Apply



Please include:



• Your CV

• A 1–2 minute introduction video

• Your experience managing Xero financial systems

• An example of financial reports you have prepared



Applications without a video will not be considered.

title: Real Estate Closing/Listing Coordinator
description:
THIS IS A FULL-TIME OPPORTUNITY AND WE DO NOT ALLOW OUR VIRTUAL PROFESSIONALS TO HAVE OTHER ONGOING VA-TYPE JOBS WHILE WORKING FOR US. Cain Realty Group is seeking to grow its Success Team by hiring an additional Administrative Assistant to serve both our home-buying and home-selling clients. There is a clear path to growth and the opportunities that could come from this role are limitless. For the Administrative Assistant role, we are only considering applicants with residential real estate experience in some capacity.



The perfect candidate for this role is a Virtual Professional that has worked as a transaction coordinator and/or a listing coordinator for another Realtor or real estate team in Texas, preferably with Keller Williams. We will consider those that have worked in this capacity for Realtors in other states, yet it would be helpful to have someone with knowledge of Texas documents. WE WILL ONLY INTERVIEW THOSE WITH RESIDENTIAL REAL ESTATE EXPERIENCE OF AT LEAST ONE YEAR.



Health Insurance is also provided through reimbursement after six months, and annual performance reviews are conducted to determine whether or not a raise has been earned. We take care of our people and are looking for long-terms Virtual Professionals.



We'd also like you to know that CRG has successfully worked with Virtual Professionals for over 6 years now. We have proven systems and models to ensure success for our VPs. We are not a company hoping to make a VP work or trying an experiment. We have a proven track record of helping our VPs become extremely successful. We are looking for long-term fits and only looking for those wanting to have CRG as their sole employer in a full-time capacity.



We will conduct reference checks, and WE WILL REQUIRE REFERENCES IN THE FORM OF A PHONE NUMBER SO THAT WE CAN SPEAK TO YOUR PRIOR EMPLOYERS. We want to ensure we are bringing on the best of the best, so we will not accept candidates only willing to provide
 addresses as a reference. WE ALSO REQUIRE A CURRENT COPY OF A VALID NBI PRIOR TO THE START DATE.



This position requires a well-organized, service-minded individual with good time-management skills and attention to detail. This person will provide administrative support to our Account Managers, which then frees them up to consistently communicate with our clients. This is a very tech-savvy position, so strong technology aptitude is a must to complete tasks. We use Sierra Interactive as our CRM and Sisu for task management.



A few of our group's most commonly used affirmations and mottos are below:

-Get comfortable being uncomfortable

-The only way to grow is to change

-Keep your emotions between the lines

-BE DO HAVE



Primary Objectives

-Maintain and manage all systems for sellers, buyers, database management, information management, and back-office support

-Manage listings alongside the Account Manager through the contract

-Keep the Agents and Account Managers informed regarding any problems or issues that need to be handled

Regular Work Activities

-System development, implementation, and management

-Information management

-Oversight of contracts and listings

-Regular, effective communication with Agents and Account Managers

-Coordinate various pre-listing activities for our home selling clients



Key Skills

-Transaction and Listing Coordination

-Strong written communication skills

-Exceptional organizational and project management abilities

-Great ability to focus

-Concerned about doing things the right way

-Calm under pressure

-Learning-based

-Service-based attitude

-Proven ability to succeed



Systems Used

-Docusign

-KW Command

-ZipForms

-Matrix MLS

-Gsuite

-Sierra Interactive

-Sisu

-Canva

-Mailchimp



People Contacts and Interactions

-Client Experience Managers – daily

-Lead Administrative Assistant– daily

-Agents – as appropriate



Work Schedule (5 days / week)

- M-F, 9 AM to 6 PM CST

- Rotating Sat shifts (11 AM to 4 PM CST) every three weeks with a Wed off that week (paid for a full 8-hour shift)



System Requirements

-Internet connection with at least 10mbps speed

-Reliable power backup



Learn More About Us!

title: SEO Specialist
description:
We are looking for an SEO Specialist who will develop and implement search engine optimization strategies to improve website rankings and strengthen the company’s online presence.



The role includes keyword research, content optimization, technical SEO analysis, link-building, and performance tracking to ensure all digital assets follow current SEO best practices.



Full time, daytime Philippine hours with crossover for meetings



Job  Responsibilities:



1. Keyword Research & Strategy

         - Identify high-impact keywords through market research and competitor analysis.



2. On-Page Optimization

        - Optimize title tags, meta descriptions, headers, and internal links.

        - Ensure content is user-friendly and keyword optimized.





3. Technical SEO

        - Perform website audits for issues such as site speed, mobile responsiveness, crawl errors, indexing, and schema markup.

        - Work with developers to implement technical fixes.





4. Content Strategy & Creation

         - Guide blog posts, landing pages, and website content.

         - Recommend topics, keywords, and formats to improve organic visibility.





5. Link Building

6. Analytics & Reporting

         - Track rankings, traffic, and conversions using tools like Google Analytics and Google Search Console.

          - Prepare reports to measure SEO performance.



7. Stay Updated

          - Monitor search engine algorithm updates and SEO trends.

          - Test new strategies to remain competitive.



Qualifications:



1. Education & Experience

        - Bachelor’s degree in Marketing, Communications, Computer Science, or related field (or equivalent experience).

        - At least 2 years of SEO and digital marketing experience.



2. Technical Skills

        - Knowledge of SEO tools such as SEMrush, Moz, or Ahrefs.

        - Familiar with WordPress, Shopify, and basic HTML/CSS.

        - Experience with Google Analytics and Google Search Console.



3. Soft Skills

        - Strong analytical and problem-solving skills.

        - Excellent written and verbal communication.

        - Organized, detail-oriented, and able to manage multiple projects.



Preferred

      - Experience with local SEO, international SEO, or ecommerce SEO.

       - Basic knowledge of PPC or other digital marketing channels.

 handle for easy communication.

.

title: WordPress Web Developer, Full-time
description:
We are an American-based web services business looking for a skilled full-time WordPress developer to join our team.



This role is primarily focused on WordPress development, maintenance, troubleshooting, plugin-related work, content/layout implementation, and general website support across multiple sites.



We are looking for someone who is technically capable, detail-oriented, dependable, and able to follow instructions carefully. This is not just a "make pretty pages" role. You should be comfortable working inside existing websites, improving functionality, fixing issues, making updates safely, and supporting ongoing website operations.



Core skills required:

- Strong WordPress experience

- HTML, CSS, JavaScript, PHP

- Experience building responsive and mobile-friendly websites

- Ability to troubleshoot plugin conflicts, broken layouts, and general site issues

- WordPress maintenance, troubleshooting, and debugging

- Ability to convert PSD designs into custom WordPress themes

- Experience with SSL implementation and website security

- Experience working with WordPress themes, plugins, page builders, and the WordPress admin dashboard

- Experience working with WordPress plugins including Custom Post Types and ACF (Advanced Custom Fields)

- Familiarity with Linux-based hosting environments (HostGator, Namecheap, GoDaddy, etc.)

- Familiarity with Google tools such as Google Analytics and Google Search Console

- Basic knowledge of SEO and website performance optimization



The kind of work involved may include:

- Updating WordPress websites

- Building or modifying pages based on direction provided

- Installing, configuring, and adjusting plugins

- Troubleshooting WordPress issues

- Improving site layout, responsiveness, and usability

- Cleaning up older sites

- Implementing content and design changes



Tools & Workflow:

- Adobe Photoshop (or similar design tools)

- VS Code (or similar code editors)

- FTP tools

- Modern web browsers for testing and debugging



Important:

We value people who can follow instructions, communicate clearly in English, and pay attention to detail. Reliability matters. Carelessness does not age well around live websites.



Compensation:

Starting at 33,000 PHP, negotiable based on experience, speed, communication ability, and quality of work.



Hours:

Preferably full-time.



HOW TO APPLY FOR THIS POSITION

Provide a link to your resume and answer the following questions.

Please note that the point of asking you to answer the following questions is to enable us to gauge your ability to follow instructions, your command of the English language, your ability to communicate clearly, and your attention to detail. **Applicants that do not fully answer the questions below will be ignored**



Please answer each question using the same numbering format below.

Questions:

1. Please describe your experience working with WordPress.

2. Have you built and launched a website from scratch to a live production site? Please describe your role in the process.

3. Please list at least three WordPress websites you have worked on and describe your role in building each site.

4. Please describe your experience with HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and PHP, and tell us which of those you are strongest in.

5. Please describe your experience working with WordPress themes, plugins, page builders, and plugin troubleshooting.

6. If you have worked with Woo Commerce or other ecommerce platforms, please describe what you did.

7. Please tell us about a difficult WordPress problem you solved and how you solved it.

8. Tell us something about yourself that is not written on your resume but will help us get to know you better as a person.

9. How many hours a week would you prefer to work? If less than full-time, please specify.

10. If hired, will this be your second job or your only job?

11. Please tell us what you would like to get better at, or gain more experience in, associated with web development generally.

12. Please include a link to a screenshot of your internet speed, confirm your computer setup, and whether you are comfortable working on live websites carefully and methodically.



To learn more about us, visit: Holistic Web Presence

title: Cryptocurrency Exchange Tutorial Video Editor
description:
We are looking for a reliable, detail-oriented video editor for a long-term partnership. Your main responsibility will be creating and editing cryptocurrency exchange sign-up guides and "how-to" tutorial videos.

1. General Tutorial Editing (Simple Repetitive Tasks)

• Workload: 5~7 videos per week (Average length: approx. 4 minutes)

• Pay: $10 per video

• Provided Materials: We will provide the following three materials:

1. Reference Video: The completed video showing exactly how the final output should look.

2. Raw Video: Clean video with no subtitles and no visual highlights (no boxes, text, arrows, etc.).

3. English Script

Workflow Process:

1. Paraphrase the Script: Slightly modify the provided English script so the meaning remains the same, but the exact wording is different.

2. Generate TTS Voiceover: Use the finalized script to generate a native American English voiceover via ElevenLabs. 

3. Audio Syncing: Add the generated voiceover to the raw video and sync the audio perfectly with the screen.

4. Add Visual Highlights: Add visual elements like boxes, text, arrows, etc., matching the reference video.

5. Add Subtitles: Add English subtitles to the final video.

Requirements:

• TTS Expert: You must be proficient in using ElevenLabs to generate natural-sounding American English voices and capable of self-reviewing your audio quality.

• Eagle-Eyed Detail: You must be able to smoothly remove any awkward audio gaps or pauses and perfectly synchronize the audio track with the video.

• Consistency: You must be able to maintain strict, high-quality standards consistently, even during repetitive batch editing tasks.

• Experience: Previous experience editing educational or tutorial videos is required.

How to Apply: If you are interested in building a long-term partnership with us, please share links (portfolio) to tutorial or guide videos you have previously edited.

Join our team and become part of a dynamic, global organization of 40 professionals across Korea, Singapore, Malaysia, and the Philippines. Collaborate closely with our regional teams to grow an exciting portfolio of leading Korean brands, including Beauty of Joseon, Needly, Tirtir, and other top-trending names in the market.

mber who can independently oversee e-commerce operations, take proactive initiative, and consistently deliver results with minimal supervision, ensuring long-term success and stability in the role.

Benefits:

title: Cold Caller/ Setter — Selling MARKETING Services to Business Owners
description:
READ THIS CAREFULLY BEFORE APPLYING. If you have never SOLD a service to a business owner, do not apply.

We are a US marketing agency called eFreedom. We SELL marketing packages to business owners. Our packages include websites, Google Ads,
 Ads, SEO, and social media management. Our clients are contractors — HVAC companies, roofers, plumbers, electricians — and real estate professionals.

YOUR JOB: Call business owners and sell them on our marketing services. You are not buying anything. You are not calling homeowners. You are SELLING marketing to businesses.

TO PROVE YOU READ THIS: Start your application with the word "SETTER" and then tell me ONE time you successfully sold a service to a business owner. What was the service, how much was it, and how did you close them. If your application does not start with SETTER it goes straight to trash.

What you do every day:



Call 150+ business owners per day

Sell them on why they need marketing (more leads, more customers, more revenue)

Handle objections like "I'm not interested" and "I already have a marketing guy"

Book qualified appointments on our CEO's calendar for a Zoom call

Follow up with leads who showed interest but didn't book

Track all calls and outcomes in GoHighLevel CRM



IMPORTANT NOTE FOR ALL APPLICANTS: When writing your application, do NOT include the phrase "I am passionate about helping businesses grow their online presence." We have seen this generic line hundreds of times and it tells us you did not write your own application. Anyone who includes that phrase or anything similar will be automatically rejected. We want YOUR words, not a robot's words.

What you MUST have to apply:



Experience SELLING a service to a business owner. Not buying. SELLING. Examples: you sold marketing, insurance, solar, coaching, SaaS, software, advertising, or any service where you called a business and got them to say yes

Strong spoken English that sounds natural on the phone

Confidence. You are calling business owners who are busy and don't want to talk to you. You need to make them listen

Thick skin. 9 out of 10 people will say no or hang up. That does not bother you

Available 8 hours/day with 5+ hours overlapping US Pacific time

GoHighLevel experience is a big plus



Describe a specific cold call where you got rejected hard and what you said to turn it around. Include the name of the company or industry you were calling. We verify these stories. If your story sounds generic or made up we will know.

DO NOT APPLY IF:



Your only phone experience is calling homeowners to BUY their property (that is not sales, that is acquisitions, completely different)

You have never sold a service to a business owner

You don't know what SEO, Google Ads, or
 Ads are

You cannot explain what a marketing agency does in one sentence



This is a ground floor role at a fast-growing agency. Prove yourself and you lead a team of callers within 6 months. We promote fast.

Pay: $700-$800/month depending on experience. Performance bonuses on every appointment that closes.

title: Image Matching Specialist
description:
We are looking for several highly detail-oriented individuals to join our team as Visual Detail Analysts. In this role, you will review images and compare them to a set of possible matches to determine the most accurate selection.



This position requires a strong eye for small visual details, patterns, shapes, and subtle differences. You will be helping improve the accuracy of our visual recognition systems by carefully analyzing images and confirming correct matches.



Responsibilities



• Review user-submitted images and compare them against a set of potential matches

• Carefully examine details such as shapes, markings, patterns, and design elements

• Select the best visual match from a list of options

• Flag images that do not match any available options

• Maintain a high level of accuracy and consistency



Ideal Candidate



• Extremely detail oriented

• Has a strong visual eye and pattern recognition ability

• Comfortable comparing images and noticing small differences

• Patient and focused when reviewing many images

• Reliable and able to follow simple instructions

• Previous experience with image review, QA, moderation, or cataloging is a plus

title: DTC Ecom Direct Response Video Editor
description:
KittySpout is looking for a Direct Response Video Editor to join our team!



In your application/subject message to us put the word "KITTY" or your application will be denied.



As our video editor, you will be responsible for editing, producing, and managing multiple creative

projects with a heavy focus on paid ad creatives for Meta Platforms. You’ll take raw UGC and

transform it into high-converting direct response ads that scale across our paid channels.

We are looking to hire someone with 3+ years of work experience. The ideal candidate has prior

experience editing DTC e-commerce ads, understands direct response principles, and knows how to

structure short-form and long form video content that captures attention and drives conversions.



Who are we?

At KittySpout, we are transforming cats and their parents’ lives by developing products designed with

the help of expert veterinarians to create products that make taking care of cats easier while also

helping improve the health and happiness of cats around the world. We've scaled quickly to become

a multi 8-figure brand in under 4 years through viral digital marketing. KittySpout has helped over

600,000+ cat owners in just 4 years since launching with a small (but mighty) core team of under 20

people — and we are looking to continue our growth by finding a great video editor to play a pivotal

role in scaling!



What is our culture like & who is a good fit?

Culture-fit is our #1 factor when hiring! We have a genuine will-to-win. No work is beneath us if it

moves us towards our goals. We utilize creativity to do more with less – and quickly. We use data to

make decisions and live by the following three core values: work smart, overdeliver, speed is king,

and better everyday. We love learning – every problem is an opportunity to grow.



If you want a stress-free corporate 9-5 job, this isn’t it.

If you want to challenge yourself and shape a fast-growing company, work directly with the founders,

and see huge career growth by playing a big role in scaling it to $100m+… If you want to drive results

with a group of passionate, smart, hardworking people, work in an environment without politics or

corporate chicanery, and play a big part in our growth being hands-on and active, all while having a

generous performance bonus structure — then you’ve come to the right place.



Key Objectives

Consistent volume of 3 ad briefs per day (3 variants each)

Increase your performance bonus by analyzing prior video metrics to increase views and conversions.

Apply direct-response copywriting principles to review scripts.

Operate with a high degree of autonomy, managing your daily workload efficiently to meet

deadlines without needing hand-holding or frequent check-ins.

Quickly learn and master new tools and software, and editing techniques as social media

trends evolve, often with less than a day's notice.

Ensure every video meets our exacting quality standards and perfectly matches the provided

instructions, minimizing the need for revisions.

Maintain clear, proactive communication with the company founders and executive team,

providing updates when necessary.

Create ad variations and iterations to scale winning ads and improve performance.

Collaborate with the creative strategy team to bring ad concepts to life.

Apply direct response marketing principles to editing (hooks, problem/solution flow,

testimonials, CTAs).

Stay up to date on internet trends and editing styles to ensure our ads feel native and

engaging.



Requirements

Fully remote.

Fluent in English.

Proven experience creating short-form direct-response videos for DTC brands.

Proven experience with professional video-editing software is required. We have a strong

preference for CapCut Pro, but proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro is also acceptable.

Paid Ad Focus: Proven experience editing Meta/Facebook paid ads that convert.

Volume: Comfortable producing 3 ad briefs per week.

Tools: Proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro (or equivalent editing tools).

Creative & Analytical Mindset: Ability to combine storytelling with data-driven feedback to

refine and improve ads.

No issue working overtime or on weekends if needed. You’re passionate about your work and

excited by the idea of producing ads that millions will see.

Excellent cultural fit as per our values above.

Excited to play a big role in scaling the company and work closely with the founders.



KPI’S you will own

3 daily briefs Quota

80% First-Pass Approval Rate: At least 80% of submissions require no revisions.



Accountabilities

Deliver 3 ad briefs per day

Weekly iterations on top-performing ads to drive continuous improvement.

Ensure ads are visually compelling, on-brand, and optimized for performance.

Work with the creative team to brainstorm and test new ad concepts.

Stay plugged into social media/UGC trends to keep our creatives fresh and competitive.

Troubleshoot underperforming campaigns by testing different edits, structures, and hooks.



This Role Is Not For You If

You are a meticulous video perfectionist who will spend hours refining a single transition or

effect. With a high daily quota, success in this role demands efficiency. Adhering perfectly to

the video template at speed is valued over spending extra time on minor details that don’t

contribute to views or conversions.

You thrive in highly collaborative, team-oriented environments with frequent meetings and

brainstorming sessions. This is a high-autonomy, "heads-down" role where you will be

working independently the majority of the time to meet your individual production goals.

You are a methodical planner who prefers stable, long-term projects and predictable

workflows. Our environment is inherently dynamic. The tools, guidelines, and video styles

can change overnight, and you must be able to pivot instantly without frustration.



How Our Hiring Works & How We Operate

When hiring, we’ll work with you to define the KPIs you’ll be responsible for and set targets. This

removes ambiguity around wondering if you’re doing a good job after you start.

Initial soft interview, then a technical interview + test project with the current head of marketing, and

a final interview to ensure culture fit. We plan to hire within ~8–12 days of conducting these

interviews. We pride ourselves on timely responses and updates for applicants.

For this role, we will walk you through the long-term vision and opportunities that have us excited

about this business — and how you fit in. We will show you our current structure and where we are

headed.

title: Senior Temu Marketplace Expert & Strategic Partner ($100k Monthly Profit Goal)
description:
URGENT: I am not looking for an employee. I am looking for a Strategic Partner and a "Growth Shark" to run a high-performance machine.



I am Advocate Matan Leker, owner of Leker Projects LLC (US-based). We have built a high-tier infrastructure, and we are ready to scale.



The Business Model (How We Operate):

Unlike 99% of the market, we do NOT do low-level China dropshipping or manual retail arbitrage.



The Backend: We use a Shopify store integrated with authentic US-based suppliers via Shopify Collective.



The Logistics: All products are already in the US. We focus on high-quality, fast-shipping items.



The Infrastructure: We have a verified US LLC and a Mercury bank account ready for massive daily payouts.



The Challenge:

The store is live and "Green," but currently invisible with only 4 impressions. I need a partner who knows how to trigger the Temu algorithm and solve the "Trust Signal" mismatch between Shopify Collective and Temu.



The Goal & The Reward:

The Milestone: We are scaling to a $100,000 monthly net profit.



The Deal: This is a performance-based partnership. You will earn a significant percentage of the net profit.



The Floor: If net profit is under $20,000, compensation is $0. I pay for elite results, not for hours.



Requirements:

Proven Scale: You must demonstrate experience managing Temu stores with high volume.



Technical Integration: You must understand how to automate the bridge between Shopify Collective and Temu (Inventory & Tracking sync).



Zero-Violation Integrity: You must know how to maintain account health without "Fraudulent Fulfillment" flags.



How to Apply (The Test):

As a legal professional, I rely on evidence. Do not send a generic resume. To be considered, you MUST send a 1-minute Loom screen recording of a live Temu dashboard you managed, showing:



Real daily payouts.



Revenue/Profit scale.



Current account health status.



If you are a driver who can handle a Ferrari, let’s talk. If you are a passenger, don't waste my time.



Best regards,

Adv. Matan Leker

Owner, Leker Projects LLC

title: Part-Time Brand Protection Specialist (Meta Ad Moderator)
description:
The Role

We are looking for a vigilant, detail-oriented Part-Time Virtual Assistant to serve as the front-line defense for our advertising campaigns. Your mission is to maintain a "clean," high-converting environment across all active
 and Instagram ads by managing social proof and neutralizing negative interference.  This is a long-term, part-time position (approx. 10–20 hours per week) designed for someone who is highly organized and can provide consistent "patrols" throughout the day.  



What You'll Do

-Ad Shielding: Perform regular patrols of all active Meta ads to hide spam, "scam" claims, and offensive language

-Strategic Hiding: Identify and hide price-shaming comments or competitor links that steal our traffic

-Customer Advocacy: Identify legitimate customer concerns or product questions and flag them to the team via 
.  

-Social Proof Boosting: Like positive comments and heart customer testimonials to increase engagement and algorithm favorability

-Daily Reporting: Provide quick "All Clear" updates or highlight recurring negative themes in team channels



What We're Looking For

-Eagle Eye: Obsessive attention to detail—nothing slips past you

-Reliable: Since ads run 24/7, we need someone who is consistent with their "check-in" times.  

-Discerning: You know the difference between a troll (hide immediately) and a frustrated customer (needs help)

-Strong English: High-level proficiency to ensure you represent the brand voice correctly



Bonus Points:

-Experience moderating e-commerce or DTC ad comments

-Background in customer service or community management

-Understanding of how social proof impacts ad performance

-You've worked with high-spend ad accounts before



Our Tech Stack 

-To be successful in this role, you must be proficient in:  

-Meta Business Suite: For all comment moderation and engagement.  

-ClickUp: For task management, following SOPs, and logging your shifts.  

-
: For real-time team communication and reporting urgent issues.  



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

-People who check in once a day and call it done

-Those who can't tell the difference between a troll and a real customer

-Anyone who hides everything without thinking

-People who miss details or let things slip through

-Those who can't commit to consistent patrol times

-People looking for a quick gig—we want long-term



Compensation & Benefits

Monthly Rate: $300/month (Part-Time: 10-20 hours/week)

Plus:

-Flexible part-time schedule that fits around other commitments

-Long-term stability—we want a permanent tea
mber

-Learn the inner workings of a high-growth e-commerce operation



Our Hiring Process

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Initial Interview with Founder

Step 3: Internal Assessment by Rescale

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training

title: High-Quality Video Editor for E-Commerce VSL Projects
description:
About the Role



We are a fast-growing eCommerce and direct-response company looking for a highly skilled Video Editor to join our creative team.



Your work will be split between 30% Video Sales Letters (VSLs) and 70% performance videos, including UGC ads, mashups, and competitor recreations for multiple eCommerce brands.



We’re looking for an editor who understands marketing, persuasion, and storytelling — not just flashy transitions. You should be able to take a brief, understand the intent behind it, and turn it into a video that sells.



This is a long-term, full-time position with the opportunity to work on a wide variety of projects and grow into a senior creative role over time.



What We’re Looking For



• Strong storytelling ability through video.

• Deep understanding of pacing, rhythm, and emotional buildup.

• Experience with VSLs or direct-response-style videos (not YouTube or reels).

• Ability to match visuals and pacing with voiceover/scripts to maximize impact.

• Strong sense of clarity, curiosity, and flow in editing.

• Fluent in English with excellent listening comprehension.

• Reliable, detail-oriented, organized, and open to feedback.

• AI Proficiency – Familiarity with AI-assisted editing tools and workflows (examples: 
, NanoBanana, Runway, Pika Labs, Descript, Adobe Firefly, and ChatGPT for scripting & copy).





Experience and Skills Required



• Minimum 2+ years of experience in professional video editing.

• Proven work on VSLs, UGC ads, mashups, or advertorial-style videos.

• Ability to follow clear SOPs and creative direction while adding your personal editing touch.

• Proficiency with tools such as Premiere Pro, After Effects, or CapCut Pro.

• Understanding of direct-response structures (hook ? story ? proof ? CTA).



Application Process and Test Task



To apply, you will complete a short test task:

• Edit 15 seconds of a VSL intro using the footage and SOP we provide.

• Demonstrate your sense of pacing, emotion, and clarity.



Process overview:



The top 5 candidates will be invited to a paid second task (60-second edit).



The best 2 editors will move on to a final paid full-VSL edit with feedback.



The top candidate will be hired for a long-term collaboration and training phase.



Compensation and Work Conditions



• Full-time, long-term position (flexible schedule, consistent weekly output required).

• Salary based on experience and performance (we pay above market for top editors).

• Remote position — you can work from anywhere.

• Opportunities for growth, ongoing training, and creative leadership.

• Must have a reliable computer, strong internet connection, and professional setup.



How to Apply



Please send the following:



Your portfolio or showreel, ideally including both VSLs and ad-style edits (UGC, mashups, or product ads).



A short message describing your experience with VSLs and eCommerce video editing.



Your expected monthly rate in USD.



Applications without a portfolio will not be reviewed. Once shortlisted, you will receive the test materials and SOP for the 15-second trial.



Why Join Us



You will work on high-performing video projects for real eCommerce brands — a mix of long-form VSLs and short-form ad creatives.

You’ll collaborate with a team that truly understands marketing psychology, creative strategy, and ad scaling, giving you the chance to improve rapidly and develop a strong portfolio in the direct-response space.



If you’re serious about mastering sales-driven editing and producing videos that convert — this is the right place to grow long-term.

title: Creative Strategist
description:
We Don't Need a Creative Strategist. We Need a Revenue-Generating Idea Machine.

Creative Strategist

Most creative strategists make pretty ads. You'll engineer the concepts that scale to millions in profitable revenue.



About Rescale Media

We're not just another e-commerce company. We're a brand incubator on a mission to build enduring, value-driven brands that bring meaningful products into families' lives.

We've scaled from just drop shipping to a 30+ person team doing $1M+/month. Our goal? Multi 9-figures. And we're just getting started.

???? Learn more at 
dia



Our Core Values

???? GENIUSES & OWNERS We partner with builders who think like founders. Not employees waiting to be told what to do—owners who see a problem and fix it.

? ITERATIONS > HOURS We don't measure success by time at your desk. We measure it by how fast you can test, learn, and improve. Ship it. Learn. Repeat.

???? TRUTH OVER EGO We prioritize honesty and clarity, even when it's uncomfortable. No politics. No BS. Just data and results.



The Role

This is the role that moves the needle more than any other. Our Creative Strategists don't just come up with ideas—they architect the concepts, angles, and hooks that turn cold audiences into raving customers.

You'll work at the intersection of psychology, data, and creativity. Every concept you develop will be tested, measured, and either scaled or killed based on real performance data.

Our brands serve faith-led families and parents who want magic in their children's lives. You'll create advertising that resonates deeply with these audiences—not cheap manipulation, but genuine connection.



We require at least 3-5 concepts per week and are open to working with freelancers.



What You'll Do

Develop creative concepts, angles, and hooks that drive profitable customer acquisition

Write ad scripts, headlines, and copy that convert

Analyze performance data to understand what's working and why

Brief video editors and designers on creative execution

Manage the creative testing pipeline—always have winners in the queue

Stay on top of creative trends, competitor ads, and market dynamics

Collaborate with Media Buyers to understand what's scaling and what's not

Build and maintain our creative knowledge base (what works for our brands)



What We're Looking For

3+ years of creative strategy experience in DTC/e-commerce

Portfolio of ads you've created that scaled to significant spend

Deep understanding of direct response principles

Strong copywriting skills—you can write a hook that stops the scroll

Data literacy—you can read a dashboard and extract insights

Experience briefing creative teams (video editors, designers)

Understanding of Meta's ad ecosystem and creative best practices



Bonus Points:

Experience with faith-based or family-oriented brands

Background in UGC strategy and influencer creative

You've built creative processes from scratch

Performance marketing or media buying experience

Strong understanding of consumer psychology



This Role Is NOT For...

We're being direct because we respect your time:

Creatives who care more about awards than results

Those who can't take feedback on their "babies"

Anyone who thinks strategy and execution are separate jobs

People who aren't comfortable with rapid iteration and testing



Compensation & Benefits

???? Monthly Salary: $2,000 - $3,000/month

Plus:

Monthly performance bonuses tied to company Operating Profit (5-25% of salary)

Quarterly profit pool distribution (2-7.5% of company profits shared among team)

Ad Bounty Program: Earn 2-7% commission on ad spend for high-performing creatives (ROAS 2.1+)

Remote-first environment (European timezone preferred)

Work with a team of A-players who actually give a damn

Direct founder access—no layers of bureaucracy

Real ownership of your domain—we don't micromanage



Our Hiring Process

We don't waste time—yours or ours. Here's how it works:

Step 1: Application (You're here!)

Step 2: Initial Interview with Founder

Step 3: Internal Assessment by Rescale

Step 4: WhatsApp update for next steps

Step 5: Signing of Independent Contractor and NDA

Step 6: Onboarding and Training



Total timeline: 1 week from application to offer.



Ready to Apply?

[  
  ]

Complete the application form above. Be thorough—this is your first impression.



P.S. Our best-performing ad ever was a simple concept that took 20 minutes to write. It's generated over $1M in revenue. If you understand why simplicity often wins, we should talk.

P.P.S. If you're reading this far, you're already more thorough than 90% of applicants. That's exactly who we want.

title: Operations and Marketing Assistant
description:
JOB TITLE

FULL TIME ROLE — Are you our next Rock Star Operations and Marketing Assistant? 



JOB DESCRIPTION

Our growing health clinic in Australia is seeking a highly motivated, clever and innovative operations and marketing person to join our evolving team.



At The Body Folk, we are a purpose-driven healthcare business committed to helping people move better, live healthier, and perform at their best. As our business grows, we are looking for the right high-performing tea
mber who is aligned with our values and wants to contribute to building smarter marketing systems and better patient experiences.

This role will support our marketing automation, CRM systems, social media scheduling and campaign workflows, helping us manage leads, marketing campaigns and communication systems more effectively.



As part of our team, you will have an exciting opportunity to:

• Learn advanced marketing automation systems

• Develop your digital marketing and CRM skills

• Contribute to improving healthcare marketing systems

• Work with a supportive and purpose-driven team culture



You do not need to know everything already. What matters most is your attitude, reliability, attention to detail, and willingness to learn.

Training will be provided to the successful candidate.



The successful applicant will:

›› Be aligned with the business purpose and culture

›› Be organised, proactive and reliable

›› Thrive working autonomously in a remote environment

›› Be driven by outcomes and results

›› Be willing to be held accountable for responsibilities

›› Be committed to continuous learning and development

›› Have strong attention to detail and accuracy

›› Have excellent written communication skills

›› Be comfortable learning and working with digital systems



The core responsibilities & outcomes for this role include:

›› Managing and tracking leads generated through marketing campaigns

›› Supporting CRM systems and maintaining organised client records

›› Building or editing
 campaigns and automation workflows

›› Assisting with marketing automation and pipeline management

›› Supporting landing pages and campaign integrations

›› Scheduling and managing social media content

›› Supporting
 lead 
 and marketing campaigns

›› Monitoring marketing workflows and reporting campaign performance

›› Contributing to the continuous improvement of marketing systems and tracking of statistics to back the marketing and revenue operations of the clinic



Our Culture

At The Body Folk we value:

Accountability – Own your commitments and follow through.

Proactivity – Anticipate challenges and prepare solutions.

Timeliness – Early is on time. Systems and schedules matter.

Communication – Follow up, clarify and communicate with empathy.

We are building a team of people who want to learn, grow, and contribute to something meaningful.



Remuneration

This role offers $800-$1200 AUD per month +13 month depending on experience and skill level.

As our business grows, there will be opportunities for greater responsibility, skill development and role progression.



How to Apply

If you believe you are the right person for this role, please send an
 with:

1 - A short intro video (max 2 mins) sharing why this role fires you up

2 - Your resume + and cover letter along with examples of your best content or social edits

3 - Your favourite content or workflow hack - anything that makes you faster, more organised, or more effective

4- why you have the skills to run the important aspects of campaign implementation and automation.

5-Your experience working with Google Docs/sheets and ability to know your way around and develop spreadsheets etc. 

Send your application to:





IMPORTANT!!!

To ensure you have read this job description carefully, please include the word:

“APPLICATION”

in the subject line of your
.

Applications without this will not be reviewed.

Thank you for your time and interest.

Dr Andrew Levick

Clinic Director and CEO

The Body Folk

title: AI Systems Builder & Executive Operations Manager
description:

 scenarios, Airtable bases, dashboards, integrations — while also running executive operations for the founder. Think fewer
s and more engineering the machine that runs the business.

 and Zapier automations across client accounts

 or Zapier (not templates — real builds)

title: AI Platform Engineering
description:
**Job Description — AI Platform Engineer (Full-Time, Remote)**



Catalyst Channel Group is an AI company that builds and deploys AI operating systems for small and mid-market businesses across healthcare, legal, insurance, and local services. We are growing fast and looking for a dedicated AI Platform Engineer to own the technical delivery of every client deployment.



This is not a support role. You are the person who builds, configures, and ships the product our clients pay for every month.



**What you will do every day:**



Configure and deploy AI voice agents that answer real business phone calls 24/7 using Bland AI and Insighto. Build AI chatbots trained on each client's business data using CustomGPT and Stammer. Create multi-step automation workflows in Make.com that connect CRM, calendars, billing, and communication tools so entire business processes run without any human involvement. Integrate client systems using REST APIs, webhooks, and JSON data mapping. Build and maintain client-facing dashboards in GoHighLevel and Retool that show real-time business performance. Write and optimize AI prompts that control how voice agents and chatbots respond, qualify leads, and handle conversations. Test and troubleshoot every deployment before it goes live. Clone and customize proven templates for each new client to keep deployment times fast.



**Tools you will work with daily:**



GoHighLevel, Make.com, Bland AI, Insighto, CustomGPT, Stammer, Supabase, OpenAI APIs, Retool, REST APIs, webhooks, JSON.



**What we need from you:**



Experience with GoHighLevel — sub-accounts, pipelines, workflows, automations, calendars. Experience with Make.com or n8n — building multi-step workflows with webhooks, API calls, and conditional logic. Comfortable working with REST APIs, JSON, and basic scripting in Python or JavaScript. Ability to learn new AI tools fast and figure things out independently. Attention to detail — every deployment must work before the client sees it. Reliable, communicates clearly, meets deadlines without being chased.



**Bonus skills (not required but valued):**



Bland AI or Insighto voice agent configuration. CustomGPT or Stammer chatbot building. Prompt engineering experience. Retool or React dashboard experience. Database experience with Supabase or PostgreSQL.



**What you get:**



A long-term full-time position — this is not a one-time project. Monthly performance bonuses based on deployment quality and speed. A clear path to Senior Platform Engineer and then Technical Lead as the company scales.



**Details:**



Full-time remote. 40 hours per week. $1,200/month starting with performance-based increases. Long-term position with growth.



**To apply:**



Send examples of GoHighLevel builds and Make.com workflows you have created. If you have configured AI voice agents or chatbots, share those as well. Show us what you have built.

title: AI Client Success & Operations Manager
description:
**Job Description — AI Client Success & Operations Manager (Full-Time, Remote)**



Catalyst Channel Group is an AI company that builds and deploys AI operating systems for small and mid-market businesses across healthcare, legal, insurance, and local services. We are growing fast and looking for a dedicated Client Success & Operations Manager to own the client relationship from first contact to long-term growth.



This is not a support desk role. You are the person who runs the client experience. You audit their business, onboard them onto our platform, train their team, and make sure they get results every single month.



**What you will do every day:**



Conduct structured business audits with prospective clients on video calls to identify their operational pain points and map how our AI platform solves them. Build targeted prospect lists using LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Apollo.io filtered by industry, company size, and geography. Write and send personalized outreach sequences via
 and LinkedIn to generate audit calls and demo bookings. Manage the full client onboarding process from signed contract to live deployment coordinating with our Platform Engineer to ensure everything is built correctly and on time. Deliver onboarding training calls via Zoom walking clients through their dashboard, automations, AI agents, and reporting. Handle ongoing client support answering questions, troubleshooting basic issues, and escalating technical problems to the engineering team with clear documentation. Track client health metrics weekly including login frequency, feature adoption, support tickets, and satisfaction. Flag at-risk clients before they cancel. Drive upsell conversations by identifying when a client is ready for additional layers, agents, or workflows and presenting the upgrade with data showing the ROI. Run monthly account review calls with every active client showing them results, gathering feedback, and recommending next steps. Create LinkedIn content and marketing materials that translate AI into language business owners understand.



**Tools you will work with daily:**



GoHighLevel for CRM and client accounts. LinkedIn Sales Navigator and Apollo.io for prospecting. Instantly.ai for cold
 campaigns. Calendly for scheduling. Zoom for calls and training. Loom for video walkthroughs. Google Workspace for docs, sheets, and slides. Slack for internal communication.



**What we need from you:**



Strong English communication, written and spoken. You will be on video calls with American business owners daily. Comfortable presenting on Zoom and explaining things clearly to non-technical people. Organized and detail-oriented because you manage multiple clients at different stages, and nothing can fall through the cracks. Ability to research prospects and understand a business quickly from their website, LinkedIn, and public information. Self-motivated because you do not wait to be told what to do. You see what needs to happen and you do it. Professional and warm on calls because clients should feel like you genuinely care about their business. A basic understanding of CRM systems because you need to navigate GoHighLevel and understand what the client sees.



**Bonus skills not required but valued:**



Sales or account management experience. Experience in healthcare, legal, or agency environments. Proposal writing or presentation experience. Experience with LinkedIn outreach or cold
 campaigns. Basic understanding of AI tools or automation platforms. Content writing for LinkedIn or social media.



**What you get:**



A long-term full-time position, not a one-time project or seasonal contract. Monthly performance bonuses based on client retention and upsell revenue. A clear path to Senior Account Manager and then Client Success Director as the company scales. Commission on every upsell you close so your income grows as your clients grow. Direct mentorship from the founder, who is a Cornell MBA, UC Berkeley CS graduate with 18 years at PwC, Meta, athenahealth, Bank of America, and IBM. You are not joining a call center. You are building a company from the ground floor, and your clients will know your name.



**Details:**



Full-time remote. 40 hours per week. $995 per month, starting with performance bonuses and commission on upsells. Long-term position with growth.



**To apply:**



Record a 2-minute Loom video introducing yourself. Tell us who you are, why you are a good fit, and walk us through how you would handle your first call with a business owner who has never heard of AI. Show us your communication skills. That is what this role is about.

title: Remote Onboarding Manager
description:
Remote Onboarding Manager (TikTok LIVE Agency)



Company: Live Boost Agency

Location: Remote (Philippines)

Salary: $700 per month

Job Type: Full-Time – Long-Term Position



About Live Boost Agency



Live Boost Agency is the largest TikTok LIVE creator network in the Netherlands and has received official awards from TikTok for its performance and creator growth.



We specialize in discovering, onboarding, and supporting livestream creators on TikTok LIVE. Our agency helps creators grow their audience, improve their livestream performance, and build sustainable income through TikTok.



To support our continued growth, we are looking for a reliable and organized Onboarding Manager based in the Philippines who will manage the onboarding process for new creators joining our agency.





Role Overview



As an Onboarding Manager, you will help recruit and onboard TikTok LIVE creators into our agency.

You will identify potential creators directly inside the TikTok app, contact them, verify their availability, and guide them through the onboarding process. You will also register new creators in our internal backoffice software and ensure they receive the correct onboarding information.



Key Responsibilities:



Creator Recruitment

Identify potential creators directly inside the TikTok app

Collect creator usernames for recruitment outreach



Availability Checks

Verify if creators are available to join a TikTok LIVE agency

Check if they are currently signed with another agency

Answer questions from interested creators



Application Process

Send onboarding
s when required

Guide creators through the application process



Creator Registration

Register new creators in the agency’s backoffice software

Ensure creator information is entered correctly



Acceptance & Welcome

Send welcome messages via WhatsApp

Provide onboarding information to help creators get started



Required Skills

Excellent written English communication

Strong organization and attention to detail

Ability to manage multiple conversations simultaneously

Comfortable using WhatsApp,
, and social media messaging

Reliable internet connection

Ability to follow structured processes



Preferred Experience (Not Required)

Experience working with TikTok or livestream creators

Experience in recruitment or onboarding roles

Experience as a Virtual Assistant, Community Manager, or Customer Support agent



Salary & Benefits

$700 per month

Fully remote position

Long-term opportunity

Work with one of the leading TikTok LIVE agencies in Europe



How to Apply

Please include the following in your application:

Your resume

At the top of your application, please write:



LIVEBOOST ONBOARDING

title: Transaction Coordinator/ Executive Assistant
description:
We are looking for an executive assistant/ transaction coordinator for our land flipping business. Your job will be described below. We are looking for someone who has experience working as an admin assistant/ transaction coordinator for another land buying or real estate company. More importantly,  we are looking for someone who is hungry to learn and grow with our company. We are looking for someone who is coachable and someone who is always looking to improve their skills every day because that’s what we strive for in our company.



1. Daily Responsibilities



The Transaction Coordinator (TC) manages the daily flow of transactions, keeping deals organized and moving without delays. Core work is handled during the morning focus block (8–12am), with afternoons reserved for
, vendor follow-ups, and reactive tasks. End-of-day reporting provides visibility for the team. This role is a full time position so we expect you to work 40 hour weeks M-F.



- Check title company updates (commitments, requirements, issues).

- Research and contact vendors (surveyors, perc testers, brokers, etc.).

- Manage the transaction inbox

- Update the TC Deal Board in Deal Management on Stride as deals progress.

- Process new incoming deals as they arrive.

- Follow up with vendors to confirm scheduling or reports.

- Monitor inspection periods ending and flag decisions to the team.

- Send end-of-day report.

- Market research

- Manage and organize CRM (we use Stride)

- Update Sellers/ Buyers weekly on where we are in the process



2. Weekly Responsibilities



Each week the TC is responsible for reporting on KPIs, updating records, and maintaining communication with sellers. This ensures leadership visibility and prevents communication gaps.



- Update Master KPI sheet (Level 10) and review in the weekly TC/Dispo meeting.

- Send seller status updates every other week.



3. Monthly Responsibilities



At month end, the TC ensures all documentation and reporting are finalized for accurate financial and operational visibility.



- Provide closed deal documentation to the accounting firm.

- Audit Project Management on Stride and deal spreadsheets for accuracy.

- Validate KPI reporting (closed deals, UC?Close averages, satisfaction scores).



4. Pay



- $800 monthly flat rate + commission

- The commission will be $100 when we close on a property we are buying for cash and another  $100 whenever we find a buyer and close on the property.

- If we are double closing, it will be a $100 commission when we close on the property and find a buyer



PS: Make a loom video answering the questions. Make sure to say "Hi MMC-LAND" so we know you are recording the video live.



Loom video questions:



1. Who in the land industry have you worked with as a transaction coordinator/ executive assistant for? If you haven’t worked in the land industry, who in the real estate industry have you worked with?



2. How many years of experience do you have in the roles we are looking for?

In your previous job as a transaction coordinator/ assistant, can you describe what your day to day looked like?



3. How’s your experience contacting the county departments, figuring out land restrictions, calling realtors to get their opinion on the property, finding title companies/ real estate attorneys?



4. Why should we pick you for this role and why do you think you’re a good fit for us?

title: Social Media Content Creator - Millennial Dog Owner Humor
description:
OVERVIEW:

We're building a premium dog gear brand for millennial professionals who love their dogs but hate cutesy pet content. Our social media should make urban dog owners feel seen — whether that's through relatable work-from-home chaos, city living struggles, or the beautiful mess of dog ownership.



We're looking for a content creator who can ideate and produce short-form video (Reels/TikToks) + 
 posts using stock dog footage, trending formats, and millennial humor. No original filming required — just great editing, witty captions, and audience instincts.



REQUIREMENTS:

- Fluent English writing (captions must sound natural, not textbook)

- Deep understanding of millennial work culture and humor (The Office references, corporate life jokes, WFH 
s)

- Strong with CapCut, Canva, or similar video editing tools

- Experience with:

   • Creating 
-style Reels with text overlays

   • Writing captions that drive shares and comments

   • Using stock dog footage + trending audio to create relatable content

- Understand Instagram + TikTok algorithms

- 15-20 hours/week availability with potentially some overlap to UAE timezone (GMT+4)



YOUR RESPONSIBILITIES:

Each week, you'll:

- Create 3–4 short-form videos (15–45 seconds, Reels/TikTok style)

- Write captions in relatable millennial voice

- Schedule posts via Meta Business Suite + TikTok

- Reply to comments and DMs (~30 min/day)

- Send weekly content batch for review by Sunday 6pm UAE time



Content themes:

- Work/office culture + dogs (40%): "POV: Your dog judging you on your 4th Zoom call"

- Urban dog life (30%): "When it's 50°C outside but your dog still expects a walk"

- Millennial struggles + dogs (30%): "My dog's out-of-office message is better than mine"



BONUS IF YOU HAVE:

- You personally relate to millennial office/WFH culture

- You follow work humor accounts 
 millennial manager 
s)

- Experience with pet or lifestyle brand content

- You have a dog (not required, but helps!)



 COMPENSATION:

$550–650/month 

Month-to-month contract, potential to scale to full-time as we grow



START DATE:

Immediately — launching content in early April 2026



TO APPLY:

Please include:



1. PORTFOLIO: Links to social accounts you've managed OR 3-5 examples of 
-style/relatable content you've created



2. TEST ANSWER: What's your favorite millennial work culture 
 account or TikTok creator, and why does their content work?



3. SAMPLE CONCEPTS: Write 2 caption ideas (text only, no video needed):

   a) A dog reacting to their owner saying "I'm just going to check one
"

   b) Monday morning energy: human vs dog



4. YOUR RATE: Expected monthly rate for this scope



We're looking for someone who gets the joke without us explaining it — someone who can turn "my dog judges my life choices" into 15 different posts that all feel fresh.

title: Real Estate Cold Calling Virtual Assistant (Lead Generation)
description:
We are a U.S.-based real estate investment company that buys houses directly from homeowners. We are looking for a reliable and motivated virtual assistant to help generate leads by calling property owners and identifying homeowners who may be interested in selling their houses.



This role focuses on lead generation through cold calling, speaking with homeowners, and setting appointments for our acquisitions team.



Responsibilities



- Make outbound cold calls to property owners using a dialing system



- Follow a simple script when speaking with homeowners



- Ask qualifying questions to determine seller motivation



- Enter notes and tag leads in our CRM system



- Schedule follow-up calls or appointments for our team



- Maintain a positive and professional attitude on calls



Requirements



- Strong English speaking skills



- Comfortable talking on the phone for several hours per day



- Experience with cold calling or sales preferred



- Reliable internet connection and headset



- Quiet work environment



- Ability to make 300+ calls per day



Compensation



- $3-4.50 per hour depending on experience



- Performance bonuses for qualified leads



- Bonus for closed deals generated from your leads



- Long-term opportunity with room for growth



Work Schedule



Full-time (40 hours per week)



U.S. business hours preferred





To Apply



Please include the following in your application:



A 1-minute voice recording introducing yourself



Any previous experience with cold calling or real estate



Your internet speed test results



In the first line of your application, please include the word “Birmingham” so we know you read the full job description.

title: Full-Time Social Media Manager & Video Editor (Long-Form + Short-Form)

title: Social Media Manager
description:
Social Media Manager (Remote / UK-Based Preferred)

About Us

We’re a fast-growing property and coaching brand helping individuals build financial freedom through

Rent-to-Rent, Airbnb, and entrepreneurship — all guided by faith and mindset principles. Our content

inspires, educates, and empowers people to step out of their comfort zones and create a life they love.

We’re looking for a Social Media Manager who understands strategy, storytelling, and social trends —

someone who can help elevate our online presence across Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

Role Overview

As the Social Media Manager, you’ll oversee the planning, creation, and execution of content that aligns

with our brand pillars: faith, business (Airbnb & coaching), and mindset. You’ll work closely with the

founder to grow the brand, boost engagement, and turn followers into clients and community members.

Key Responsibilities

• Develop and execute monthly content strategies for Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, and YouTube.

• Create and schedule engaging, high-quality content (reels, carousels, captions, and YouTube

titles/thumbnails).

• Analyse content performance and report weekly insights (growth, engagement, conversions).

• Manage the content calendar and ensure timely posting across all platforms.

• Research and implement current trends, audio, and hashtags relevant to property, entrepreneurship,

and mindset.

• Support in community management (comments, DMs, engagement).

• Collaborate on campaign ideas for launches, webinars, and events.

• Repurpose long-form content into short-form assets for reels and shorts.

• Suggest creative hooks, captions, and storytelling angles aligned with the brand’s voice.

Skills & Experience

• 2+ years managing social media for brands or influencers (bonus if in property, coaching, or lifestyle).

• Proven track record of growing social platforms organically.

• Strong storytelling, copywriting, and caption-writing skills.

• Basic video editing and content creation skills (Canva, CapCut, or similar tools).

• Excellent understanding of social media algorithms and engagement strategy.

• Detail-oriented, self-motivated, and able to manage multiple projects.

Preferred Personality

• A creative thinker who “gets” content that educates, inspires, and converts.

• Confident suggesting new ideas and spotting opportunities for virality.

• Interested in faith, mindset, and business growth content.

• Proactive, reliable, and aligned with our brand values: excellence, authenticity, and purpose.

Perks

• Work closely with a fast-scaling personal brand.

• Flexible remote work with clear deliverables.

• Opportunity for bonuses and long-term growth.

• Creative freedom to shape campaigns and storytelling direction.

To Apply

Please send:

1. A short introduction about you and your experience.

2. Links to pages or accounts you’ve managed.

3. A 1-minute video or voice note sharing why you’d be a great fit.

title: Recruitment Manager
description:
ABOUT THE ROLE:

We’re looking for a proactive, detail-oriented Recruitment Manager to help us build and maintain a high-quality hiring pipeline for our fast-growing dental business. This is a part-time remote role (10–15 hours/week to start) with flexible hours and long-term growth potential.



You’ll manage the full recruitment flow: from screening resumes to scheduling interviews to maintaining a “bench” of top candidates for future hiring.



We are NOT hiring just because we have an immediate opening. We are always hiring. Your job is to make sure we’re never caught off guard when a position opens.



ABOUT US:

We’re a high-performance, values-driven dental team based in Canada. Our leadership invests in systems, training, and people. We move fast, we document everything, and we take care of our team.

We’ve already hired and trained an overseas team member and know how to support remote talent.



RESPONSIBILITIES:

Keep job posts live and updated on Indeed (and other platforms if needed)

Review incoming resumes and Google Form responses

Conduct initial screening Zoom interviews (you’ll be provided with scripts and scorecards)

Record and summarize interviews using Fathom or similar tools

Maintain a hiring tracker (Google Sheets) with notes, scores, and rankings

Schedule interviews with the CEO or Operations Manager (using Calendly or similar)

Send warm rejection
s to great candidates we want to keep on our bench

Organize and maintain our Bench Strength list for future openings

Suggest hiring process improvements as you learn what works



REQUIREMENTS:

Excellent written and spoken English

Previous experience in recruiting, HR, executive assistance, or project management

Comfortable interviewing candidates over Zoom

Reliable internet and quiet workspace

Strong attention to detail and follow-through

Familiarity with Google Workspace (Gmail, Docs, Sheets, Forms)

Familiarity with tools like Calendly, Zoom, and Slack (or quick to learn)



NICE TO HAVE (NOT REQUIRED):

Experience with the dental or medical industry

Experience working with Canadian-based businesses

Experience using Fathom, ClickUp, Notion, or other productivity tools





HOURS & COMPENSATION:

10–15 hours per week to start

Flexible hours, as long as tasks are completed on time

Hourly rate: $5–$8 Canadian depending on experience

Long-term position with potential for growth (including full-time roles)



HOW TO APPLY:

Send your resume

Include a 1–2 minute Loom video introducing yourself and why you’re a good fit for this role



Answer these 3 short questions in your message:

What experience do you have with hiring or interviewing?

What systems have you used to organize tasks or applicants?

What’s your favorite productivity or organizational tool, and why?



Visit our INSTAGRAM:
