title: Video Editor - Short Form Content
description:
Job Title: Short-Form Video Editor

Location: Remote Working

Experience: 2–3 Years Minimum (Required)



***PLEASE FILL OUT THIS FORM TO APPLY - 



Position Overview

We are seeking a Short-Form Video Editor to transform long-form podcasts into high-performing YT Shorts, Instagram Reels, TikToks and X videos. You will identify hooks, craft impactful opening seconds, add dynamic captions, and deliver platform-native edits that drive reach and retention. The ideal candidate is fast, meticulous with captions and identifies and follows the current short form trends in play on social media. 



Here are links to some of our projects: 











Responsibilities

• Collaborate with the team to understand hook angles

• Review long-form recordings to identify 10–15 key moments per episode.

• Edit tight 20–120s cuts with strong cold opens and clear CTAs.

• Add dynamic captions/kinetic text aligned to brand guidelines

• Design simple motion elements: progress bars, punch-in framing, overlays and end slates.

• Optimise for each platform (9:16, 1:1, 16:9); deliver correct codecs, bitrates and subtitles.

• Source relevant B-roll, screenshots and app captures to reinforce key ideas.

• Colour match and lightly grade for consistent looks across batches.

• Maintain high throughput with organised timelines, markers and batch naming.

• QC for typos, caption timing, audio clarity and on-brand styling.







Requirements

• Very strong communication with quick responses in messaging applications.

• Expert proficiency in Adobe Premiere Pro; competent in After Effects for text/motion.

• Demonstrable experience editing short-form content for creators or podcasts.

• Strong sense of hook craft, pacing and meme-aware timing while maintaining brand tone.

• Minimum of 2–3 years of professional video editing experience.

• Portfolio showing short-form edits with captions and platform-native storytelling.

• Strong organisational and multitasking abilities with keen attention to detail.

• Reliable hardware and internet suitable for fast turnarounds and batch deliveries.







Nice to Have

• DaVinci Resolve colour tools.

• Experience with Frame.io & Notion

• Understanding of trading/finance topics and terminology.

• Familiarity with A/B testing hooks, thumbnails and titles.







IMPORTANT

• Please provide a portfolio link. Any candidates that fail to provide a portfolio link upon application will be ignored.







Additional

• Experience in the trading industry is a significant bonus and will strengthen your application.

title: EXCELLENT SOCIAL MEDIA MANAGER
description:
Full-Time Social Media Manager (Creative + Highly Organised)



We are looking for a full-time Social Media Manager to help grow a personal brand and business in the property, entrepreneurship, and personal development space.



Our company operates in the Airbnb / Rent-to-Rent property industry, alongside coaching and educational content.



We are looking for someone who is creative, highly organised, communicative, and comfortable working in a fast-moving environment.



This role will focus primarily on short-form content, but experience supporting long-form content is a plus.



This is a long-term opportunity for the right person who wants to grow with the brand.



Responsibilities



Your responsibilities will include:



• Posting short-form content daily across Instagram, TikTok,

• Managing DMs, comments, and engagement on social media platforms

• Helping execute the content strategy

• Tracking content performance and providing weekly updates

• Maintaining an organised content schedule

• Working closely with the founder to implement ideas and campaigns



Requirements



We are looking for someone who is:



• Creative and understands engaging social media content

• Highly communicative and responsive

• Extremely organised with strong attention to detail

• Comfortable working in a dynamic environment where feedback and changes happen quickly

• Able to take initiative and suggest ideas

• Reliable and consistent with posting and engagement



Skills Required



Experience with the following is important:



• Instagram

• TikTok

• Video editing (CapCut, Premiere Pro, or similar)

• AI

• Social media scheduling tools

• Content repurposing



Experience Required



Please provide the following in your application:



• Links to social media accounts you have managed

• Examples of short-form videos you have edited or created

• Evidence of content that has performed well

• Your previous experience managing social media accounts



Important



We are currently in a growth and testing phase, so the ideal candidate must be comfortable with:



• Receiving feedback

• Adapting quickly to changes

• Communicating clearly and consistently



How To Apply



To confirm you have read this job description carefully, please start your application with the words:



CREATIVE GROWTH



Applications without this will not be considered.



Please Answer These Questions In Your Application



Please send 2–3 examples of short-form videos you have edited or created.



Tell us about a page you helped grow. What results did you achieve?



If you were managing our page (IG: Nicole.Klutse), what 3 content ideas would you suggest for a brand that teaches people how to start an Airbnb business?



How would you handle a situation where the content strategy changes and you receive feedback to adjust the direction of the content?



What system would you use to ensure posts, comments, and DMs are handled consistently every day?

title: We Are Hiring: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator
description:
We Are Hiring: Medical Referral Specialist / Referral Coordinator

title: Executive Tech VA (Growth Systems & Automation)
description:
We’re looking for a Tech-Savvy Executive Technical Virtual Assistant (Growth Systems & Automation) to help implement and manage growth systems that support the client’s goal of increasing online sales and driving consistent monthly revenue.



This role focuses on executing and maintaining marketing and operational systems that help attract, convert, and track new customers. The ideal candidate is comfortable working with automation tools, CRM systems, and marketing workflows, and can independently implement systems that support the client’s growth strategy.



This is a hands-on implementation role for someone who can translate growth plans into practical systems, automations, and workflows.



Main Responsibilities / Day-to-Day

Growth System Implementation:

* Assist in implementing growth initiatives designed to increase website traffic and drive online orders.

* Set up and maintain systems that support customer acquisition and lead management.

Workflow & Automation Setup

* Build and manage automation workflows using tools such as Zapier, Make, or similar platforms.

* Connect marketing tools, CRMs, and lead capture systems to streamline operations.



Lead Capture & Funnel Support:

* Set up lead capture forms, landing pages, and basic funnels to convert traffic into leads or customers.

* Ensure leads are routed properly into the CRM and follow-up systems.



Campaign Support:

* Assist in launching marketing campaigns by preparing the technical setup required for tracking and lead capture.

* Coordinate system integrations needed for marketing and outreach activities.



Analytics & Optimization:

* Track performance metrics such as leads, traffic, and conversion rates.

* Support ongoing improvements to workflows and automation based on campaign performance.



Documentation & System Maintenance:

* Maintain documentation of workflows and systems implemented.

* Monitor automations and troubleshoot issues when needed.



Essential Qualifications / Skills (Must-Haves):

* Strong technical and systems-oriented mindset

* Experience with automation tools such as Zapier, Make, or similar platforms

* Familiarity with CRM systems (e.g., HubSpot, GoHighLevel, or similar)

* Experience setting up lead capture systems, funnels, or marketing workflows

* Ability to translate growth strategies into working systems

* Strong written and spoken English communication

* Ability to work independently and proactively solve problems



Preferred Skills (Nice-to-Haves):

* Experience with landing page or funnel builders

* Familiarity with
 marketing platforms

* Experience supporting marketing campaigns or growth initiatives

* Basic understanding of digital marketing analytics

* Creative thinking when improving workflows or customer journeys



Ideal Candidate:

You are a tech-savvy problem solver who enjoys building systems that help businesses grow. You’re comfortable working with automation tools, CRMs, and marketing platforms, and you enjoy turning ideas or strategies into functional workflows that save time and drive results. You take ownership of your work, communicate clearly with stakeholders, and are proactive in identifying ways to improve systems and processes.



Hiring Process:

Round 1: Interview with the Talent Team (skills and experience assessment)

Round 2: Interview with the Client (role alignment and expectations)



Timezone: MST (Mountain Standard Time)

title: Online Training Tech Facilitator
description:
Job Title: Virtual Workshop Tech Producer / Facilitator (UK Timezone)

Company: Spark AI

Role Type: Freelance

Location: Remote (Philippines / SE Asia)

Working Hours: Must be available during UK business hours e.g., 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM GMT. Workshops are typically 3 hours long.

About Us

Spark AI provides AI training for creative and strategic agencies. Through our "Accelerator 2.0" programme, we deliver online workshops. Our goal is to help agency staff become knowledgeable, skilled, and confident in their use of AI tools.

About the Role

We are looking for a highly organised, tech-savvy Virtual Workshop Tech Producer to support our coaches during live online training sessions.

Our workshops are typically run as 3-hour interactive sessions with a maximum of 20 participants. While our coaches focus on teaching and engaging the audience, you will be the behind-the-scenes support ensuring the technology runs flawlessly.

The main focus of this role is being an exceptional tech host. You need to be calm under pressure, excel at managing virtual meetings and troubleshooting tech issues on the fly.

Key Responsibilities

Pre-Session Setup: Log in 15-30 minutes before live sessions to test audio, video, screen sharing, and ensure all links/tools are ready.

Breakout Room Management: Quickly and accurately open, assign, and manage breakout rooms for small group exercises. This is a critical part of the live training experience.

Technical Troubleshooting: Act as the first point of contact for any attendee experiencing tech issues, so the coach is not interrupted.  The ability to manage users through user error and navigation of systems.  Some users may think the platform isn’t working and all they need to do is allow mic access etc.

Lobby/Waiting Room Management: Admit attendees, and assist anyone having trouble connecting.

Chat & Link Management: Drop relevant links (Miro boards, exercise templates, prompts) into the chat at the exact right moments.

Platform Support: Assist the coach with launching polls, managing timers, or spotlighting speakers.

Miro Board Support: Keep an eye on the collaborative Miro boards to ensure participants are in the right place and not accidentally deleting templates.

Requirements & Qualifications

Tech Stack Expertise: Strong experience hosting and producing online training or events on platforms like Google Meet, Zoom, and Microsoft Teams.

Miro Experience: You must be comfortable navigating and using Miro (our primary collaboration workspace) alongside the video platforms.

Exceptional English: Written and spoken English is mandatory, as you will be communicating with English speaking agency professionals.

Rock-Solid Setup: You MUST have a highly reliable, high-speed internet connection and a quiet working environment.

Calm Under Pressure: Tech issues happen. We need someone who doesn't panic and can quickly find solutions while keeping a positive, professional attitude.

Punctuality: Absolute reliability and punctuality are critical. The workshops cannot start without you.

Nice-to-Haves

An interest in Artificial Intelligence and the creative industry!

Compensation

Rate: $8.00 USD per hour.

Shift Details: Each workshop runs for 3 hours, so a standard shift will be approximately 3.5 hours to account for pre-session setup and post-session wrap-up.

, or phone?• Introduce the Green Fingerprint concept?• Send our short introduction video?• Start conversations with business owners or managers?• Book meetings with our sales managers?• Follow the simple sales process we provide

Our technical partners handle the technical work.?Your role is simply to start the conversation.

title: AI Image and Video Expert
description:
WHO WE ARE LOOKING FOR



We are seeking an AI Creative Expert with strong visual taste, technical skill, and a forward-thinking approach to content creation to support the visual content production of a startup jewelry brand.



You should have a solid background in graphic design, experience creating brand assets, and hands-on expertise using AI tools for images and video. A strong portfolio and an eye for aesthetics are essential, especially for fashion, lifestyle, or jewelry-related visuals.



Requirements:

- At least 2 years of experience in graphic design, digital creatives, or AI visual content creation

- Proven experience creating website graphics and brand visual assets

- Hands-on experience with AI tools for image and video generation (e.g., Midjourney, DALL·E, Runway, Pika, Adobe Firefly, etc.)

- Strong proficiency in design tools such as Adobe Creative Suite, Canva, or similar

- Ability to translate brand identity into compelling visuals across digital platforms

- Strong sense of color, typography, composition, and motion visuals

- Ability to work efficiently, meet deadlines, and incorporate feedback

- Experience with beauty, lifestyle, fashion, jewelry, or consumer brands is a strong advantage

- Good command of English with clear, professional communication

- Familiarity with Google Workspace, Notion, or similar collaboration tools



WORK SCHEDULE / DETAILS

Flexible working schedule: you manage your own hours, but must be available for coordination or updates between 3:00 PM – 11:00 PM PHT when needed

Type: Project-based (with opportunity for long-term collaboration)

Location: Fully Remote



Expected Weekly Output:

- 100–200 AI-generated images featuring jewelry products, lifestyle scenes, or brand visuals (weekly)

- 10–15 short-form AI-generated videos suitable for social media and marketing



HOW TO APPLY

Please follow the instructions carefully. Applications that do not follow the steps below will not be considered. Only shortlisted applicants will be contacted.



Subject Line:

[Surname] AI Image and Video Expert



Introduction: Briefly introduce yourself, state your interest in the role, and summarize your relevant experience. Include the design and AI tools you regularly use.

Portfolio: Provide a link to your portfolio showcasing AI-generated images and videos. Include at least one AI-generated jewelry image and one AI-generated jewelry video sample.

Rates: State your expected project-based rates in USD.

title: E-Commerce Operations Manager
description:
E-Commerce Operations Manager

Full-time · Remote · $5–8/hr



ABOUT US

We run multiple e-commerce brands out of Denmark. We work with suppliers, a 3PL warehouse, and handle everything from order flow to customer service. We are a small, remote team that moves fast and relies heavily on AI tools, automation, and smart systems to scale without unnecessary overhead.



WHAT YOU'LL OWN

- Day-to-day e-commerce operations - supplier communication and negotiating, 3PL coordination, making sure orders flow correctly and nothing falls through the cracks. 

- Supporting and gradually taking over from our current customer service team as we transition to AI-assisted support.

- Building SOPs and workflows - when you see a repetitive task, your instinct should be to systematize or automate it. We can learn you how.

- Proactively identifying bottlenecks and coming to us with solutions, not just problems.



WHO WE'RE LOOKING FOR

You don't need to come in with 5 years of e-com experience. Our best tea
mber started with only customer service experience - we taught him everything. What we can't teach is hunger, reliability, and the ability to learn fast. You're curious about AI tools and generally improving everyday, you figure things out independently, and you show up every single day.



NON-NEGOTIABLES

- This is a full-time role with a fixed daily schedule. We need someone who is consistently available during agreed hours - not someone who disappears for days due to family obligations or personal commitments. We pay only for hours worked and respect your personal life - but your work hours are yours to protect.

- You must be comfortable using AI tools (ChatGPT, Claude, etc.) and willing to learn automation platforms like n8n, 
 and the new things moving like Claude skills, clawdbot etc. No deep experience required - but zero curiosity is a dealbreaker.



Strong written and Spoken English. Clear, direct communication. No need to sugarcoat things - we prefer honesty over harmony.



How to apply:

Record a 1–2 minute Loom video and include the link in your application.



Tell us who you are and why you're a great fit for this role. Speak from the heart - no script, no notes, no reading from a screen. We want to hear you talk naturally, like you're chatting with a friend about why this job excites you.



Start your application subject line with the word READY so we know you've read the full job post. Applications without a Loom video will not be considered.

title: Meta Ads Manager
description:
We're a fast-moving e-commerce advertising agency based in the USA looking for a sharp, results-driven Meta Ads Manager to join our team. This role is built for someone who knows how to build solid campaigns from the ground up, follow a system, and take full ownership of performance.



1. What You'll Do



## Campaign Management

- Build and launch Meta ad campaigns 
 & Instagram) from scratch following our agency SOPs and campaign structure

- Manage budgets, bids, audiences, and creatives on a daily basis

- Monitor performance and make proactive optimizations before issues escalate



## Strategy & Analysis))

- Analyze campaign data and translate it into clear decisions and next steps

- Identify scaling opportunities and flag underperformance with a diagnosis and a solution

- Stay current on Meta's ad delivery system — including updates like Andromeda — and adjust strategies accordingly



2. What We're Looking For



- C2-level English fluency — non-negotiable

- 3+ years of hands-on Meta Ads Manager experience for e-commerce brands

- Solid understanding of the Andromeda update and what it means for how campaigns are built today

- Process-driven: you follow SOPs precisely and understand why structure matters

- Solution-focused: when something breaks, you diagnose, report, and act

- Experience with manus ai is a plus



To apply, answer the following three questions. Or, if you want, send us a loom.



Q1: Walk us through a Meta campaign you built from scratch for an e-commerce brand — account structure, audiences used, and results achieved.

Q2: What is the Andromeda update and how has it changed the way you build or manage campaigns today?

Q3: Describe a campaign that dropped in performance. What was the root cause, what did you do to fix it, and what was the outcome?

title: Customer Experience Virtual Assistant (Phone Based)
description:
Note: Interested applicants must submit their application exclusively through the OnlineJobs platform. Do not
 the company directly. Any candidate who contacts the company outside of the OnlineJobs system will be disqualified from consideration.



Are you someone who takes pride in handling customer interactions the right way—calmly, professionally, and consistently? Do you do well with clear expectations, scripts, and processes, and enjoy improving quickly through feedback? If so, Maid In America Cleaning Services, based in Clarksville, TN, wants to hear from you.



We’re seeking a Customer Experience Virtual Assistant to serve as a frontline point of contact for our customers and a dependable executor of structured processes. Working closely with our sales and customer experience teams, you’ll be responsible for answering inbound calls, handling customer requests, following defined scripts, and routing issues accurately.



This role is process-driven and phone-heavy, especially during training. The work can be fast-paced at times, but it is highly structured. Your ability to stay calm, follow instructions precisely, and take coaching seriously will have a direct impact on customer satisfaction and team efficiency.



What You’ll Do



- Answer & Handle Inbound Customer Calls: Be the first point of contact for customers and new inquiries, answering calls promptly, professionally, and calmly while following provided phone scripts.

- Follow Scripts & Decision Trees: Handle common customer needs—such as scheduling questions, reschedules, basic service inquiries, and initial issue intake—by following clear scripts and escalation rules exactly.

- Route Requests Accurately: Determine when a request can be handled directly and when it should be escalated to the appropriate tea
mber, ensuring clean handoffs and no dropped balls.

- Create a Positive Customer Experience: Make customers feel heard, cared for, and confident that their request is being handled, even when issues or complaints arise.

- Document Interactions & Updates: Log accurate notes and updates in our systems so the internal team always has clear context and next steps.

- Support Structured Administrative Workflows: Execute defined backend processes (task tracking, updates, file movement, and follow-through) by following SOPs and checklists without skipping steps.

- Receive Coaching & Improve Quickly: Actively apply feedback on calls, scripts, and workflows, improving speed, accuracy, and confidence over time.



Who We’re Looking For



- Process-Driven & Detail-Oriented: You’re comfortable following scripts, checklists, and SOPs exactly, and you don’t skip steps or “freestyle” your work.

- Calm & Professional on the Phone: You communicate clearly and confidently, stay composed with customers, and can handle questions or mild frustration without getting flustered.

- Highly Coachable: You take feedback seriously, apply it quickly, and improve fast—especially when it comes to phone scripts and customer handling.

- Reliable & Consistent: You show up on time, follow through on tasks, and can be counted on to do things the right way every time.

- Comfortable with Structure: You prefer clear expectations, defined processes, and knowing exactly what “good” looks like in your role.

- Tech-Comfortable: You’re comfortable working inside tools like Slack, shared documents, and task systems—or you can learn them quickly with instructions.

- Strong Communicator: Whether by phone, chat, or written notes, you communicate clearly, professionally, and respectfully.



Our Core Values



- Communication

- Connection

- Quality

- Service

- Teamwork



If you share these values, we want you on our team to help drive our company forward.



Important Note: Screening Step



SERIOUS APPLICANTS ONLY:

Complete our personality test to see if there’s a mutual fit:


/p/fzxN5FC9302s 

Give honest answers; there are no right or wrong results.



Submit your application with the subject line beginning with the core value we’ve listed that you most resonate with.



IMPORTANT: When applying, please use AT LEAST 5 Apply Points



Skills & Requirements

- Fluent English: Strong spoken and written English is required. This is a phone-based role, and customers must be able to understand you clearly and comfortably.

- Customer Service Experience: Prior experience handling customer inquiries or support requests over the phone is required.

- Process & Administrative Competence: You’re comfortable following multi-step processes, documenting information accurately, and keeping systems up to date.

- Attention to Detail: You consistently capture the right information, follow instructions precisely, and avoid careless errors.

- Coachability: You’re open to feedback, willing to be corrected, and able to apply coaching quickly—especially when learning phone scripts and customer-handling expectations.

- Technical Readiness:

  - Reliable computer with backup power options

  - Quality headset and microphone

  - Quiet workspace suitable for phone calls

- Ability to Work Monday-Friday, 8AM-5PM CST.

- Reliable Internet & Backup Options: Stable internet connection with a backup plan to ensure consistent availability and responsiveness.



Why Join Maid In America Cleaning Services?



- Impactful Role: Your quick execution and initiative will directly affect customer satisfaction and operational efficiency.

- Growth-Oriented Culture: We embrace new ideas, reward proactive thinking, and train daily for continual improvement.

- Supportive Team: Collaborate with a group that values each other’s contributions and thrives on a feedback-rich environment.



If you’re passionate about productivity, eager to work in a fast-paced setting, and confident in your ability to deliver high-quality results quickly, apply now and become an integral part of the Maid In America family!



Apply Today: Submit your application per the instructions above. We look forward to learning more about you!

title: A-Player Sales & Marketing VA – Global Brand Expansion
description:
At Residentas, we don’t just fill seats; we build empires. We are an international hospitality powerhouse operating premium properties in Lisbon, Portugal, and the United States. We are currently building one of the most respected brands in the short-term rental industry, and we need an A-Player Sales & Marketing VA to serve as the right hand to our Sales & Growth Manager.



This is not a "short-term gig." This is a career-defining role for someone who is tech-savvy, analytically minded, and obsessed with growth. If you are tired of juggling five different clients and want a stable, long-term home where your work actually moves the needle, keep reading.



THE CHALLENGE (WHAT YOU WILL BE DOING):



+ Market Intelligence: Perform deep-dive research and competitor analysis to keep Residentas ahead of the curve.



+ Listing Optimization: Master the algorithms of OTAs (Airbnb, 
, etc.) to maximize global visibility.



+ Revenue Reporting: Create and maintain high-level spreadsheet reports that track our global performance.



+ Growth Support: Launch high-impact marketing campaigns and research innovative upsell opportunities (early check-in, late check-out, luxury packages).



+ Operational Excellence: Data entry, documentation, and ensuring our internal systems are 100?curate.



THE PROFILE (WHAT WE ARE LOOKING FOR):



- COMMUNICATION MASTERY: Your English (written and verbal) must be exceptional. We can train you on our systems, but we can't train "clarity."



-TECH-FLUENT: You are a pro with MS Office, project management tools, and you know how to leverage ChatGPT to work faster and smarter.



-RADICAL AUTONOMY: You don't wait to be told what to do. You anticipate needs and solve problems before they reach the Manager's desk.



-DETAIL OBSESSION: You are the person who catches the mistake that everyone else missed.



THE THREE NON-NEGOTIABLES:



+ Integrity: We value honesty over perfection. If you make a mistake, own it. We move fast, and trust is our currency.



+ Commitment: This is a full-time, long-term commitment. If you’re looking for a "side hustle," this is not for you.



+ The "Hunger" to Learn: We are growing fast. We want someone who is excited to learn new skills and step into projects they’ve never handled before.



WHY JOIN US?



+ Competitive Pay: Starting at 30,000 PHP per month, with clear pathways for raises based on your performance and commitment.



+ Remote Freedom: Work from anywhere with a reliable setup.



+ Direct Impact: You aren't just a VA; you are a vital part of our strategic projects and global growth.



+Elite Growth: Exposure to high-level decision-making in the international real estate and hospitality tech space.



HOW TO APPLY (The First Test):



I personally read every application. If you can't follow these instructions, you aren't the A-Player we are looking for:



Send me a direct message here on OnlineJobs.



In the subject line, you MUST include the code SM3 at the very end.



Once I receive your message with the correct subject, I will send you the link to our official application form.



I’m looking for the best. Is that you?



Henrique

Sales & Growth Manager | Residentas

title: Live Sales Documentation Assistant (Remote)
description:
Job Title: Live Sales Documentation Assistant (Remote)



Job Description



We are looking for a reliable and detail-oriented individual to help document our live sales. This role requires someone who can stay focused during live streams and accurately track product information in real time.



This is long-term, consistent work for someone who proves reliability, accuracy, and strong attention to detail.



Responsibilities



• Document the title of the listing and listing number

• Record the brand of the item

• Record who purchased the item (buyer username)

• Record the price the item sold at

• Capture a screenshot of the front of the frame

• Capture a screenshot of the side of the frame

• Accurately record all information in Google Sheets and double-check your work

• Stay in tune with the seller during the live and help support the flow of the show

• Assist virtually with tasks such as pinning listings, editing listings, and setting up giveaways correctly



Requirements



• Must be reliable and punctual

• Must be very detail-oriented

• Ability to stay focused during live sales

• Comfortable using Google Sheets

• Ability to double-check work for accuracy

• Ability to follow instructions and work independently



Pay



• $3 per hour

• Pay may increase based on reliability and performance



Schedule



Friday, Saturday, Sunday

• 1:00 PM – 9:00 PM PST



Monday, Tuesday, Thursday

• 6:00 PM – 10:00 PM PST



• Strict hours with no breaks, as full focus during the live sale is required.



This role is ideal for someone looking for consistent long-term work who can maintain accuracy and attention to detail during live sales.



Application Trial



Applicants will be asked to complete a trial documentation task during a live sale to demonstrate attention to detail.



You will be asked to document items in Google Sheets using the following format:



Title of Listing: BRAND NEW SUNGLASSES/RX FRAMES #319

Brand: Marc Jacobs

Buyer: username123

Price Sold At: $25

Picture of Frame (Front): Screenshot showing the sunglasses and item number

Picture of Frame (Side): Screenshot showing the side/arm of the sunglasses



Important



• Screenshots must show the item clearly and include the item number

• The listing number changes after each auction, so accuracy is critical

• You must capture both the front and side of the frame



Applicants who demonstrate accuracy, reliability, and attention to detail during the trial will be considered for the position.

title: Freight Sales Representative – Freight Brokerage #2
description:
Job Overview



We are a growing freight brokerage focused on moving freight throughout the United States. Our current markets include freight moving through major logistics hubs such as Savannah, Charleston, Los Angeles, Houston, and other high-volume freight locations.



We are looking for experienced Freight Sales Representatives who are capable of building their own book of business and generating freight opportunities through their experience and industry knowledge.



This role is ideal for someone with 2–3 years of freight brokerage or logistics sales experience who understands the freight industry and can begin prospecting and securing customers quickly.



Candidates must be comfortable identifying shipping companies, contacting decision-makers, and securing freight lanes for our brokerage.



This is a performance-driven position with strong commission potential and long-term income from customers you bring into the company.



?



Compensation



Base Salary

$300 per month



Commission

10% of gross revenue generated from customers you bring to the company.



Important:

This commission is lifetime commission.



Once you bring a customer to the company, you continue receiving the 10% commission on that account for as long as the account produces freight revenue.



This structure allows experienced sales professionals to build long-term income as their book of business grows.



?



Required Experience



Applicants must have 2–3 years of experience in the freight or logistics industry, including experience in one or more of the following:



• Freight brokerage sales

• Third-party logistics (3PL) sales

• Truckload freight sales

• Logistics account executive roles

• Transportation sales

• Drayage or port freight coordination



Candidates should understand:



• Freight lanes

• Truckload and LTL freight

• Shipping volumes

• Logistics pricing and quoting

• Import/export freight movement



This experience should allow the candidate to identify potential customers independently and begin generating freight opportunities quickly.



?



Key Responsibilities



• Identify companies that ship freight regularly

• Prospect shipping companies through phone calls,
 outreach, and LinkedIn

• Build and maintain your own book of business

• Secure freight lanes and shipping agreements

• Generate freight quotes and proposals

• Build relationships with shipping managers and logistics coordinators

• Coordinate with operations once freight is secured



Sales representatives must be comfortable working independently to identify freight opportunities and develop new business.



?



Sales Process Tracking



All sales activity must be tracked using the company’s operational tools.



Sales representatives will be expected to maintain accurate records of:



• Companies contacted

• Sales pipeline stages

• Freight opportunities

• Customer communication history

• Active freight lanes



Because of your experience, you should be able to quickly manage your sales pipeline and move prospects through the sales process efficiently.



?



Geographic Freight Markets



While our initial operations may focus on markets such as Savannah, our goal is to maintain a small but highly effective freight operation that can pursue opportunities across multiple freight markets.



Sales representatives must be comfortable identifying opportunities in locations such as:



• Savannah

• Charleston

• Los Angeles

• Houston

• New York / New Jersey

• Other major freight hubs



Candidates should be comfortable pursuing freight opportunities in different geographic markets when necessary.



?



Daily Expectations



Typical daily activity may include:



• 50 outbound prospect calls

• 50 outbound
s

• 10 freight quote opportunities

• Building relationships with shipping companies



?



Ideal Candidate



The ideal candidate:



• Has freight brokerage experience

• Understands the logistics industry

• Is comfortable making cold calls

• Can generate freight opportunities independently

• Wants to build long-term commission income



?



Application Instructions



To apply, please include:

 1. A brief description of your freight experience

 2. The type of freight you have worked with

 3. Your experience in freight sales or logistics sales



To confirm that you read this entire job post, please begin your application with the words:



FREIGHT TEAM

title: AI Creative Manager & Face-Swap Specialist (After Hours Project)
description:
We are After Hours, a high-end digital agency at the cutting edge of AI-driven entertainment. We specialize in creating and managing 100% synthetic AI models with hyper-realistic consistency. We are looking for a dedicated Creative Manager to join our founding team.



YOUR MISSION

Your goal is to ensure our AI models (like "Jessica") look 100% real across all levels of content—from simple selfies to high-ticket private videos. You will be responsible for the "Intimacy Ladder," ensuring every piece of content is indistinguishable from reality.



KEY RESPONSIBILITIES



Model Consistency: Use Face-ID and LoRA references to maintain a perfect look for our models across different lighting and outfits.



Video Face-Swapping: Process RAW "Body Double" footage into final AI-model videos using cloud or local tools.



Content Tiering: Produce 3 levels of content (Teasing, Soft-Intimacy, and High-Ticket Private content).



Voice Syncing: Using ElevenLabs to ensure the model’s voice matches the visual content perfectly.



Quality Assurance: Spotting and fixing any AI "glitches" or artifacts before content reaches the customer.



REQUIRED TECHNICAL SKILLS



Expertise in Face-Swapping (DeepSwap, FaceFusion, Rope, or similar tools).



Experience with AI Image Generators (Midjourney, i10x, Stable Diffusion).



Experience with ElevenLabs for voice cloning and synchronization.



Strong eye for detail (Skin texture, hair color consistency, lighting).



Ability to work with Adult/Intimacy content comfortably and professionally.



COMPENSATION & PERKS



Full-time position (Work from home).



Starting salary: $300 - $800 USD (Negotiable based on experience).



Performance Bonuses: Earn commissions based on Token sales and model growth.



Long-term career path: Potential to become "Head of Content" as the agency expands.



HOW TO APPLY



Send a link to your portfolio or examples of your best Face-Swap work.



Tell me which AI tools you are currently subscribed to or proficient in.



Use the word "CONSISTENCY" in your subject line so I know you read the whole post.

title: Marketing and Community VA
description:
About PropertyLenz

PropertyLenz is a US-based SaaS app that helps independent landlords and property managers document property condition at move-in and move-out. It generates timestamped inspection reports in minutes — protecting landlords in deposit disputes and saving them thousands in court.



We are an early-stage startup. You would be our first marketing hire. The founder works full-time in another role and needs someone reliable to execute a clear, documented marketing playbook independently.





What You Will Be Doing

This is an execution role, not a strategy role. You will be given a detailed playbook with post templates, outreach scripts, community guidelines, and a weekly schedule. Your job is to follow it consistently and report results every Friday.



Daily tasks

Post helpful content in US landlord
 groups (2–3 posts per week, across groups)

Reply to comments and community posts where people mention tenant disputes, deposit problems, or inspections

Post on LinkedIn 2x per week using provided templates

Monitor and reply in Reddit communities (r/landlord, r/realestate, r/PropertyManagement)

Send 5 cold outreach
s per day to small property management companies using provided templates

Follow up with non-responders after 5 days

Schedule all posts using Buffer



Weekly tasks

Write a short Friday report covering posts published, engagement, outreach sent, and what worked

Use AI tools (Claude or ChatGPT) to vary post wording so content does not look repetitive





What We Are Looking For

IMPORTANT

We care more about reliability and attention to detail than experience. If you follow instructions carefully and show up every day, you will be great at this job.





Must have

Comfortable using ChatGPT or Claude to write and improve content

Strong written English — posts must sound like a real person, not a bot

Experience posting in
 groups or managing social media accounts

Organised and self-directed — you will work independently with minimal supervision

Reliable internet and available during overlapping hours with US Central Time (even a few hours)



Nice to have

Experience with Buffer or a social scheduling tool

Familiarity with Reddit communities

Any background in real estate, property management, or SaaS products

Experience with cold
 outreach





What We Offer



Detail

Description

Pay

Depending on experience (paid monthly via PayPal or Wise)

Hours

Approx. 20 hours/week — flexible, no set schedule required

Contract type

Independent contractor, part-time

Start date

As soon as possible

Supervision

Weekly check-in with founder (15–20 min). Otherwise self-directed.

Growth

As PropertyLenz grows, this role grows. We want a long-term partner.







How to Apply

To apply, please send the following:



A short introduction (3–5 sentences): who you are, your experience, and why this role interests you.

Your answer to this question: A landlord posts in a
 group saying “I just lost $900 in small claims court because I couldn’t prove the tenant damaged the carpet.” Write the reply you would post as a PropertyLenz community VA.

List the AI tools and social media tools you use regularly.



FILTER NOTE

Applications without the reply in item 2 will not be reviewed. This tells us you read carefully and can write in a natural, helpful tone — the most important skill for this role.









A Note on Working Together

PropertyLenz is a small product built by one person solving a real problem for landlords. We are not a large company and we do not pretend to be. What we can offer is a genuine partnership: clear expectations, a detailed playbook so you are never guessing, prompt payment, and real growth opportunity as the product takes off.



We want someone who takes ownership of this role and feels proud of the work. If that sounds like you, we would love to hear from you.

title: Outbound AppointmentOutbound Appointment Setter (Instagram DM) - B2B Agency Setter (Instagram DM)

- STRUCTURED - You track everything, nothing falls through the cracks

- COMMUNICATIVE - You update me immediately when a meeting is booked + daily status reports

- QUALITY-FOCUSED - You understand that 10 great conversations beat 100 copy-paste messages

MUST HAVE:

COMPENSATION:

Applications without video will not be considered.

title: Shopify Web Design & Site Maintenance
description:
IMPORTANT: READ BEFORE APPLYING!



You MUST read this entire post carefully, including the “How to Apply” section.

Applications that do not follow instructions will NOT be reviewed.



Rate: $4.00/hr starting

Type: Independent Contractor (Hourly, Weekly Invoicing)

Schedule: Multiple shifts available

• 12AM–8AM CST

• 8AM–4PM CST

• 4PM–12AM CST

(Central Standard Time)



Primary Role: Shopify  Web Design & Site Maintenance

Location: Remote (Philippines applicants welcome)



About the Role:



We are hiring a Shopify  Web Design & Site Maintenance who can stay alert, follow process, and also execute clean website work.



Your responsibility is website work :

• Web design, updating products, banners, pages, menus, etc.

• Making sure our branding, layouts, and promos are current and consistent



This is NOT a “watch Netflix in the background” job. We are looking for someone dependable, calm under pressure, and detail-focused who can handle both responsible monitoring and professional presentation of our online brands.



You will be trusted with sensitive access. Reliability is everything here.



Core Responsibilities



Web/Creative 

• Design, update, and maintain websites (Shopify, WordPress, or similar CMS)

• Create and upload homepage banners, landing pages, promo sections, etc.

• Keep brand look consistent (fonts, colors, message, tone) across sites

• Do light content edits (product descriptions, pricing, images, disclaimers)

• Make sure sites stay clean, mobile-friendly, and easy to navigate



Daily Ops / Communication

• Communicate with management through WhatsApp and

• Track hours accurately using Timeproof (this is required)

• Send weekly invoice on time for payment

• Follow escalation procedures exactly (no freelancing/guessing)



Minimum Requirements (Do NOT apply if you don’t have these)



• Excellent written and spoken English

• Proven experience in web design/website management (Shopify, WordPress, HTML/CSS, etc.)

• Quiet, distraction-free workspace (no TV, kids, loud background noise while on shift)

• Dual monitors (REQUIRED): one screen for security feeds, one screen for work

• Stable high-speed internet connection

• Reliable computer or laptop that can stream multiple live cameras smoothly

• Strong focus and honesty—you must actually be present and awake the entire shift

• Consistent attendance. If you disappear, you’re done.

• Comfortable following instructions and documenting what you did every shift



Preferred / “Nice to Have”



These will move you to the top of the list:



• Backup power (UPS, inverter, generator, etc.)

• Graphic/layout skills (Canva, Photoshop, Illustrator, etc.)

• Experience working overnight/US hours without issues



Tools You’ll Use



• Shopify —website edits and updates

• Canva / Photoshop – simple graphics, homepage banners, etc.

• Timeproof – time tracking / attendance verification

• WhatsApp – shift communication and escalation

• Dialpad – urgent escalation calls or voi
 monitoring

•
 – daily reports, i ---------- summaries, and admin communication



Compensation & Payroll



• $4.00/hour starting rate

• Paid weekly by invoice (independent contractor)

• Workweek is Monday–Sunday (flexible)

• Payments are sent every Monday after we review your invoice and hours

• This is hourly contractor work, not a salaried employee position



We reward people who show up every day, follow the process, and don’t cause problems. If you’re consistent and valuable, there is growth.



Who This Role Is (and Is NOT) For



You’re a fit if:

• You treat this like a real job, not “extra income while you multitask 3 other gigs.”

• You’re calm, observant, and not dramatic.

• You can update a website banner without breaking the entire layout.



You are NOT a fit if:

• You can’t work US time zones reliably

• You have unstable internet or no backup plan for power

• You disappear, ignore messages, or oversleep shifts

• You get bored easily and mentally “clock out” while still on the clock



We are only looking for teammates who will treat this seriously.



How to Apply (Follow Exactly)



Send ONE
 to 
 line:

Application – Shopify  Web Design & Site Maintenance  – [Your Name]



Your
 MUST include all of the following, or it will not be reviewed:



- Resume (PDF or DOC)

- Short introduction

- Tell us about your web design experience

- Shift availability in CST



Example: “I can work 12 AM–8 AM CST Monday–Friday.”

- Confirm your equipment

- Do you have dual monitors?

- Internet speed (upload/download)?

- Do you have backup power?



Final Note:



We are actively hiring. If you’re reliable, steady, and serious about long-term work, we want to hear from you.

title: Experienced HubSpot Specialist
description:
HUBSPOT SPECIALIST (REMOTE – PART TIME)

Auckland-Based HubSpot Partner Agency | Philippines or Indonesia | 20 hrs/week to start



---



ABOUT US



We're a growing HubSpot Partner Agency based in Auckland, New Zealand, working with a range of clients across the APAC region. We're passionate about delivering high-quality HubSpot implementations and helping our clients get the most out of their CRM, marketing, and sales tools. As we grow, we're expanding our remote team and looking for a skilled HubSpot specialist to join us.



---



THE ROLE



We're looking for an experienced, detail-oriented HubSpot Specialist to support our team in delivering exceptional work for our clients. You'll be working directly with our Auckland team on a range of HubSpot portals — building automations, configuring custom properties and views, and helping keep client systems clean, efficient, and scalable.



This role starts at 20 hours per week with strong potential to grow into a full-time position for the right person.



---



WORKING HOURS



• 7:00am – 3:00pm (your local time), Monday to Friday

• 20 hours per week to start

• Must be able to attend regular team check-ins during these hours



---



WHAT YOU'LL BE DOING



• Building and managing HubSpot automations (workflows, sequences, lifecycle stage logic)

• Creating and configuring custom properties, custom views, and pipeline structures across Hubs

• Supporting CRM hygiene — data clean-up, list segmentation, and contact management

• Assisting with onboarding new clients into HubSpot portals

• Collaborating with the Auckland team via Asana to manage tasks, priorities, and deadlines

• Documenting processes and building SOPs for client portal configurations

• Troubleshooting HubSpot issues and providing solutions in a timely manner

• Contributing ideas to improve how we deliver HubSpot work for clients



---



WHAT WE'RE LOOKING FOR



Essential:

• 3–4+ years of hands-on HubSpot experience (agency experience strongly preferred)

• Strong proficiency in HubSpot automations — workflows, sequences, and advanced logic

• Proven ability to build custom properties, views, and pipeline configurations

• At least one active HubSpot certification (Marketing Hub, Sales Hub, CMS, or Solutions Partner)

• Excellent written and spoken English

• Reliable internet connection and a professional remote work setup

• Ability to work independently and manage your own time effectively



Highly Desirable:

• Experience using Asana for project and task management

• Familiarity with working across multiple client HubSpot portals simultaneously

• Experience with HubSpot reporting and custom dashboards

• Understanding of sales and marketing processes in a B2B context

• Prior experience working with or for a HubSpot Partner Agency



---



COMPENSATION



• Up to NZD $30 per hour, depending on experience and skills

• This is an above-market rate — we invest in quality people

• Paid fortnightly via [your preferred payment method, e.g. Wise / Deel / direct transfer]



---



HOW TO APPLY



Please send the following to [your
 address]:



1. A short introduction (3–5 sentences) about your HubSpot experience

2. 2–3 examples of HubSpot work you've done (automations built, portals configured, etc.)

3. Links to or screenshots of any relevant HubSpot certifications

4. Your current availability and expected start date



Applications without HubSpot examples will not be considered. We're looking to move quickly — shortlisted candidates will be contacted within a few days of applying.

title: HIRING Full-Time Video Editor for 7 Figures A Wellness Brand
description:
About Us

We’re a fast-growing DTC brand in the health and recovery space, scaling to 30K days with performance-driven creatives. Every ad we launch is backed by data and crafted to convert. We’re looking for a video editor who not only edits but also thinks like a marketer - someone who wants to grow, push limits, and create winning ads at scale.



The Role

We’re hiring a Video Editor who can consistently deliver high-performing Meta video ads (30–120s). This is a long-term, remote role with $4 start salary which increase if hit rate is on target. Also introducing performance bonuses in 2nd month.



What You’ll Do

- Edit high-converting ads for Meta (30–120s)

- Apply strong hooks, pacing, captions, and transitions

- Work with UGC, b-roll, and AI-generated content (Heygen, ElevenLabs, Nano Banana and VEO3)

- Test UGC-style videos, TikTok-style ads, AI visuals, and VSLs

- Analyze performance data & iterate quickly based on KPIs (hook rate, hold rate, CVR)

- Collaborate closely with the Creative Manager + other editors to push volume

- Source raw footage & voiceovers to bring concepts to life

- Experiment with new formats, trends, and storytelling angles



You Need

- Experience editing performance-driven Meta ads (UGC/direct response)

- Proven portfolio of short-form, direct response ads

- Strong creative eye and ability to deliver 15 ad concepts per week

- Understanding of marketing psychology, hooks, and consumer behavior

- Hunger to grow — willing to test, fail, and iterate fast



What You’ll Get

- Base salary: $4 per hour (start salary that increases if performance is on target) + performance bonuses

- Fully remote role

- Direct collaboration with a high-performing editors, strategists and Founder

- Managed under a dedicated Creative Manager who oversees editors and strategy



How to Apply

Send us a link to your portfolio or past performance ads



Contact via WhatsApp:

title: Do you love making people feel cared for? Support our CEOs as an Executive Personal Assistant!
description:
Title: Executive Personal Assistant



Important: Make sure to read the full listing for application instructions.



Do you love making people feel cared for? Are you the one who remembers everyone’s birthdays, plans amazing gatherings, makes fun plans, and brings warmth into the lives of those around you?



This is NOT your typical assistant job. It’s deeply personal. You’ll work with a kind but intense U.S.-based pair of brothers (proven entrepreneurs working as Co-CEOs of the same business) to support their lives, not the company they are building. From keeping friendships alive and planning meaningful experiences to sending thoughtful gifts and helping them stay on track with personal goals, you’ll be part organizer, part cheerleader, part coach. If you’ve ever been called the “mom” of your group and you’re looking for a decades-long position, this might be your dream job.



Your Role

* Build trust by executing on tasks and communicating clearly, which will lead to taking on more responsibility, which will then lead to increases in pay.

* Keep relationships thriving by managing a personal CRM and helping stay in touch with friends and family.

* Use technology to help automate certain tasks that are repetitive.

* Track habits, support routines, and act as an accountability partner for personal goals.

* Pick out thoughtful, creative gifts for birthdays and other special 
nts.

* Research products, tools, and ideas to make life easier, better, or more fun.

* Plan and book unforgettable travel, great hotels, and the perfect dinner spots.

* Jump in on special personal projects wherever a helping hand is needed.



What’s In It for You

* A Long-Term Role: This is meant to last. The entrepreneurs who you'd be an assistant to are looking for a lifetime assistant.

* Great Place to Work: These entrepreneurs are known to have a super high retention rate of employees and create a great work environment.

* Creative Work: From planning memorable trips to picking out the perfect gift, this role lets you flex your creative muscles and thoughtful side every day.

* Variety: No two days will feel the same. You’ll get to research, plan, coach, organize, and more.

* Paid Leave: You'll get at least 10 days of paid leave plus major holidays.

* Remote Flexibility: Work from the comfort of your home and gain flexibility with hours once trust is built.



Desired Attributes

* Extremely caring, social people-person who will excel in personal tasks

* High attention to detail and organizational skills

* Very strong written and oral English skills

* Minimum 50 Mbps Internet Speed

* Designated office space in your home



To apply and ensure your application is considered, do all of the following two steps:

1. DM with a quick introduction to yourself if you're interested. Include the word "cupcake" *in your subject line*, and Include your resume. ++Bonus points for a video introduction, though it's not strictly required

2. Fill out this form:

3.  Add the Letters "PA" in the "What's your full name" field [E.g. PA - John Doe], so we know what role you are applying for.

title: GoHighLevel Website & Automation Builder (Part-Time – Potential Full-Time)
description:
About Us



iRocks Marketing is a U.S.-based, veteran-owned digital marketing agency that helps local service businesses grow using modern marketing technology. We specialize in building “Smart Websites” that combine lead capture, CRM systems, and marketing automation using GoHighLevel.



We are looking for an experienced GoHighLevel specialist to help us build websites and configure automations using our existing templates and snapshots.



This position will start part-time, but there is strong potential to grow into a long-term full-time position as our agency expands.



Your Responsibilities



You will be working behind the scenes, helping our agency launch websites and automation systems for local businesses.



Your responsibilities will include:



• Building websites in GoHighLevel using templates

• Customizing pages with client branding (logo, colors, text, images)

• Editing pages using the GoHighLevel drag-and-drop builder

• Importing and configuring GoHighLevel snapshots

• Setting up CRM pipelines and lead capture forms

• Connecting forms to workflows and automations

• Setting up basic workflows and automation sequences

• Connecting calendars and contact forms

• Making layout adjustments and adding sections to pages



We already have templates and systems built, so you will not be starting from scratch.



Requirements



Applicants must:



• Have real experience using GoHighLevel

• Understand how to build pages inside GoHighLevel websites/funnels

• Have experience setting up workflows and automations

• Be comfortable importing and configuring snapshots

• Be organized and detail-oriented

• Have good written English communication skills

• Have reliable internet and a stable work environment



This role is not client-facing, but clear communication is important.



Tools We Use



• GoHighLevel

• WhatsApp (communication)

• Loom (optional for walkthroughs)



Pay



• $5 – $8 USD per hour depending on experience

• Part-time to start

• Opportunity to grow into a long-term full-time role



How to Apply



To apply, please include:



A brief description of your experience with GoHighLevel



Examples of websites or automations you built in GoHighLevel



A short message explaining why you are a good fit for this role



Please include the phrase “Smart Website Builder” in the first line of your application so we know you read the full post.



Important



We are looking for someone reliable who wants a long-term opportunity and is comfortable building websites and automation systems inside GoHighLevel.

title: TikTok & Instagram Ads Manager for Trading Product (Remote)
description:

We’re launching an affordable plug-and-play trading indicator that helps beginner traders make consistent, small wins across multiple timeframes — no complicated charts or subscriptions. Think of it like a lottery, but users actually control the outcome: small investment, real strategy, repeatable results.



We need a skilled Ads Manager to:



Responsibilities:

-Set up and manage ads on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube Shorts

-Create ad campaigns that drive traffic to our landing page

-Monitor ad performance, optimize for conversions

-Provide weekly reports on clicks, conversions, and ROI

-Suggest new ad ideas and hooks based on performance



Requirements:

-Proven experience running TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube ads

-Knowledge of paid social media marketing strategies

-Ability to analyze campaign performance and optimize budgets

-Basic understanding of marketing psychology

-Good English communication



Preferred:

-Experience with trading / finance products is a plus

-Familiarity with small, high-converting products



Budget / Payment:

-$300–$600/month (negotiable based on experience)

-Option to scale or take % of revenue later



How to Apply:

-Share past campaigns you managed

-Show ad performance metrics

-Explain your approach to scaling a small product
